subject: Critical Deadline Tonight!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
We have less than 6 hours before our fundraising deadline. |
---
| |
---
| |
# Please help us hit our fundraising goal.
We have less than 6 hours to reach our fundraising goal. This is one of our last big reports before absentee ballots are mailed in a few short weeks.

Can you help us reach our goal with a [$50, $25, or even $10](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e9c4d143ce&e=a212bb87cc) donation?

Please help Troy win in November. Troy is the only candidate with broad business experience, a strong record of service, and plans to help reduce prescription drug prices and the cost of medical insurance.

Troy is a business leader and combat veteran, not another career politician running for an office he doesn't understand.

We need someone who will protect consumers against bad actors and be a thoughtful steward of our public lands.

Anything helps. **[DONATE HERE:](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=e8cc424087&e=a212bb87cc)** https://secure.anedot.com/troy-downing-for-montana/donate

Thank You!

---

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We're still short. |
---
Hi friend,

It's almost midnight here in Georgia. With just a few minutes to go until this grassroots fundraising deadline, consider how far we've come:

Recent polling shows me with a narrow lead over Senator David Perdue -- **_as even Fox News and Breitbart now recognize Perdue's campaign is seriously struggling._**

Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than _any other Democratic challenger._

**Our momentum is strong, friend, but we're still a little short of tonight's grassroots fundraising goal of $100,000.**

**[Can you chip in before bed tonight to make sure we maintain this momentum?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e298f/5b2c1286/39a089e0/25f30bdb/463300745/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_mm_bed?refcode=em_2020_09_15_mm_bed")**

David Perdue, Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell have failed us.

_We need new leadership, friend,**and we need it now!**_

**[I can't do this without you. So please, chip in right now to help us reach our critical mid-month goal by midnight tonight. Anything you can give is a huge help.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e298f/5b2c1286/39a089e0/25f30bdb/463300745/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_15_mm_bed?refcode=em_2020_09_15_mm_bed")**

name: Team Hagerty
subject: One Year Of #TeamHagerty
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jd/) September 15, 2020 **One Year Of Team Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last week, we celebrated one year since Bill Hagerty announced his campaign to represent Tennessee in the U.S. Senate. There is less than a month until early voting begins, and Team Hagerty isn't slowing down. We're so grateful for the love and support Tennesseans have shown us throughout this journey so far. #TeamHagerty is going to keep pushing and continue our momentum until we can call him Senator Hagerty!You can watch the full video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-y/) **NFIB Is On #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-j/) The National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB) PAC, the largest small business association in the United States, has endorsed Bill's campaign for U.S. Senate. Now more than ever, small businesses need leaders who understand the importance of reducing regulatory red-tape in a manner that creates an environment that supports small business growth. As Tennessee's former chief economic leader and a businessman, Bill understands what it takes to stimulate economies and help small businesses. In the U.S. Senate, Bill will be a strong advocate of Tennessee's small businesses.Read the press release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-t/) **Bill's Statement On President Trump's SCOTUS Nominees** Following President Trump's announcement of potential Supreme Court nominees for his second term, Bill released a statement praising the President for continuing to support and nominate strict constitutionalist judges. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris would work to destroy our democracy - packing the courts with liberal activist judges who seek to make law from the bench. We must re-elect President Donald Trump and send Bill to the U.S. Senate to confirm strong constitutionalist nominees who will not legislate from the bench.Read the full statement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-i/)** **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. **Are You Registered To Vote?** Early voting begins in only 29 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[WJHL:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-o/) Hagerty touts trade, foreign policy and economic development experience in Johnson City stop****[Shelbyville Times-Gazette:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-b/) Bill Hagerty: We must support farmers, walking horse industry****[Jackson Sun:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-m/) U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty hears concerns from leaders in West Tennessee****[WBBJ:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-c/) Sheriffs, mayors attend Q&A with Senate candidate Bill Hagerty**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-e/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xldido-fuutjhhtj-ji/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty

Nashville, TN 37215

In the U.S. Senate, Bill will be a strong advocate of Tennessee's small businesses.Read the press release Bill's Statement On President Trump's SCOTUS Nominees Following President Trump's announcement of potential Supreme Court nominees for his second term, Bill released a statement praising the President for continuing to support and nominate strict constitutionalist judges. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris would work to destroy our democracy - packing the courts with liberal activist judges who seek to make law from the bench. We must re-elect President Donald Trump and send Bill to the U.S. Senate to confirm strong constitutionalist nominees who will not legislate from the bench.Read the full statement Looking To November We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. Are You Registered To Vote? Early voting begins in only 29 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Hagerty touts trade, foreign policy and economic development experience in Johnson City stop Bill Hagerty: We must support farmers, walking horse industry U.S. Senate candidate Bill Hagerty hears concerns from leaders in West Tennessee Sheriffs, mayors attend Q&A with Senate candidate Bill Hagerty What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" " I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." " Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

name: Eric Trump
subject: My father needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b7914cbd0b362f95ab2f4b5db06b14e0b902b5c329f0fd8eef4d886a35309e58e9dbb1dd24d1f4d9840f2820df1a78ff6a642c9c99749f46

Friend,

When my father announced his run for President in 2015, he pledged to every American that he was going to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.

Since then, he’s slashed taxes, cut through the red tape, and let the economy soar to heights never seen before. He’s rebuilt the mighty American military, killed terrorist leaders, and secured our border. Once again, thanks to him, America became the envy of the world.

We can’t let my father’s work be undone. That’s why we need your help.

There’s just under 50 days until the Election and we need to maintain our momentum. To keep our lead over the Radical Left, we must CRUSH every single fundraising goal.

name: Texas Alert (via Voto Latino)
subject: How we block Trump’s path to reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
There are at least five million unregistered voters in Texas |
#
| **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19182467/252086285/-1253868255?refcode=20200916&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjNlOWM5ZS0xY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_lHfUKIGjCYkDkd4Dx1rO4YwspNQIGr6pytju_LGm4=)**
---
Peter --

We like what we’ve been seeing in Texas this summer: _Sooo many_ young people have been registering to vote. **But the truth is that we still need to register A LOT MORE voters if we’re going to flip Texas from a red to blue state -- and block Donald Trump’s path to reelection. [Will you pitch in right now to help us do it?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19182468/252086286/-1253868255?refcode=20200916&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjNlOWM5ZS0xY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_lHfUKIGjCYkDkd4Dx1rO4YwspNQIGr6pytju_LGm4=)**

Here’s a reality check: There are still at least _five million_ unregistered voters in Texas and many of them are Latinx. That’s way more than enough to turn the tide in Texas this year -- we just need to register and mobilize them.
[Donate to register more voters in Texas now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19182469/252086287/-1253868255?refcode=20200916&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjNlOWM5ZS0xY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_lHfUKIGjCYkDkd4Dx1rO4YwspNQIGr6pytju_LGm4=)
---
It’s like this across the country -- Latinx voters are expected to be the second-largest voting bloc in 2020 for the first time in history with **28.8 million** eligible Latinx voters. But 10.2 million of them aren't registered. Are we really willing to just leave all those votes sitting on the table when _so much_ is at stake in this election?

We know that times are tough, so we're only asking that you donate whatever you can. **Just $15 makes a big difference -- that’s what it costs for us to register and mobilize a voter.

Friends, we only have a few weeks left to try and flip Texas. This could be our shot at stopping Trump from being reelected. [Will you please donate now to help us do it? We’re counting on your support.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/19182470/252086288/-1253868255?refcode=20200916&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjNlOWM5ZS0xY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_lHfUKIGjCYkDkd4Dx1rO4YwspNQIGr6pytju_LGm4=)**

Thank you,

Your friends at Voto Latino
PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
---
Voto Latino
PO Box 35608
Washington, DC 20033
United States

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Bad news, Peter
body:
We have just a few hours left until our mid-month deadline and we’re still $8,108 SHORT of our goal.
Peter,I've got bad news. We have just a few hours left until our mid-month deadline **and we 're still $8,108 SHORT of our goal.**But here's the good news. All donations made before MIDNIGHT are 5X MATCHED to put us over the top. [**Can you chip-in?**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlddie-fuutjhhtj-r/)**ALL DONATIONS BY MIDNIGHT ARE 5X MATCHED** [CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlddie-fuutjhhtj-y/) [CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlddie-fuutjhhtj-j/) [CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlddie-fuutjhhtj-t/) [CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xlddie-fuutjhhtj-i/) My team told me to reach out to you because you've been such a loyal supporter of President Trump and our campaign. name: Margaret Good
subject: thanks to you, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19186026/252106991/-940294256?refcode=091620-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzRlNGNhMS0yN2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PM6r18gFQql4WzwucBqw0ZfjR_LLsJlOVLqllTan3vs=&emci=d98927d2-79f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=d74e4ca1-27f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

I’m humbled.
Friend,

I’m humbled. The outpouring of support our campaign has seen over the last few days has given us a real boost and allowed us to stay on track as we head towards our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election!

**Supporters like you delivered. But now, we have to keep our momentum going.**

Our campaign is powered by supporters in Englewood, across Florida, and across our nation, because the implications of this race reach far and wide. As long as we can continue to rely on your support, our people-powered campaign can overcome the odds and flip this seat from red to blue, no matter how many corporate PAC-funded attacks are thrown our way.

Together, we can build back our economy better than before, bring accountability to Washington, and deliver real change to Florida and our nation. But to do that, I’m counting on your help.

I can’t compete in this election without your support, which is why I want to thank you for standing by me in this fight.

Thanks again,

Margaret

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19186028/252106993/1073285021?refcode2=d74e4ca1-27f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=d98927d2-79f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=d74e4ca1-27f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091620-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzRlNGNhMS0yN2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PM6r18gFQql4WzwucBqw0ZfjR_LLsJlOVLqllTan3vs=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19186029/252106994/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzRlNGNhMS0yN2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PM6r18gFQql4WzwucBqw0ZfjR_LLsJlOVLqllTan3vs=)**
If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19186030/252106995/-1805212762?refcode=091620-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzRlNGNhMS0yN2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PM6r18gFQql4WzwucBqw0ZfjR_LLsJlOVLqllTan3vs=&emci=d98927d2-79f7-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=d74e4ca1-27f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

name: Martin Sheen
subject: Eugene DePasquale needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Let me tell you, it’s not every day that you meet a candidate like Eugene. He is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in The West Wing's best moments -- inspiring, hard-working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19188905/252135662/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_ms_all-nd&refcode2=2a50c1af-2ff8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTUwYzFhZi0yZmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGvinqxXV-L5OFImqkTjsyEoRsGi5z1LV2VX2xJLqGo=) Hello there,

My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet on _The West Wing_.

I don’t have the kind of (_fictional_) power that I used to have as a (_fictional_) president. But I’ve devoted my life outside of acting to political activism by doing everything I can to support the causes and candidates that I believe in, like Eugene DePasquale.

Let me tell you, it’s not every day that you meet a candidate like Eugene. He is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in _The West Wing_ 's best moments -- inspiring, hard-working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results.

**Right now, I’m reaching out to you because Eugene has an important fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days.[Will you join me in supporting Eugene at this key moment in his campaign by chipping in $5?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19188906/252135663/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_ms_all-nd&refcode2=2a50c1af-2ff8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTUwYzFhZi0yZmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGvinqxXV-L5OFImqkTjsyEoRsGi5z1LV2VX2xJLqGo=)** | [Rush a donation to support Eugene »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19188907/252135664/1819641719?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_ms_all-nd&refcode2=2a50c1af-2ff8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTUwYzFhZi0yZmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGvinqxXV-L5OFImqkTjsyEoRsGi5z1LV2VX2xJLqGo=)
---

If it's not personal it's impersonal, and as such no one cares. So to get a little personal, politics to me is about hope. It’s about our children being able to experience a brighter, more just tomorrow because of what we fight for today. And that starts with voting.

Elections are a time where we come together as a country to decide whether or not the politics of our present represent who we are as Americans or if we’ve gone too far off track. In 2018, it was the American people who decided that enough was enough and elected one of the most diverse freshman classes into the House of Representatives.

And now, as we inch closer to November 2020, perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetimes, we are once again taking our voices to the ballot box. And friend, I can’t picture a better person to represent PA-10 than Eugene.

Eugene’s determination, and commitment to fighting for PA-10 is evident in his career and his character. Eugene will bring values that are sorely needed to Washington and work to make life better for PA-10.

I’ve never run for office. clean_body: Let me tell you, it’s not every day that you meet a candidate like Eugene. He is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in The West Wing's best moments -- inspiring, hard-working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results. = Hello there, My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet on The West Wing. I don’t have the kind of (fictional) power that I used to have as a (fictional) president. But I’ve devoted my life outside of acting to political activism by doing everything I can to support the causes and candidates that I believe in, like Eugene DePasquale. Let me tell you, it’s not every day that you meet a candidate like Eugene. He is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in The West Wing 's best moments -- inspiring, hard-working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results. Right now, I’m reaching out to you because Eugene has an important fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days.= | = If it's not personal it's impersonal, and as such no one cares. So to get a little personal, politics to me is about hope. It’s about our children being able to experience a brighter, more just tomorrow because of what we fight for today. And that starts with voting. Elections are a time where we come together as a country to decide whether or not the politics of our present represent who we are as Americans or if we’ve gone too far off track. In 2018, it was the American people who decided that enough was enough and elected one of the most diverse freshman classes into the House of Representatives. And now, as we inch closer to November 2020, perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetimes, we are once again taking our voices to the ballot box. And friend, I can’t picture a better person to represent PA-10 than Eugene. Eugene’s determination, and commitment to fighting for PA-10 is evident in his career and his character. Eugene will bring values that are sorely needed to Washington and work to make life better for PA-10. I’ve never run for office. But I’ve seen a lot of campaigns up close, so I know it’s not easy. body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

We need help getting Democrats registered and ready to vote. The West Virginia Democratic Party is focusing all of our attention on GOTV right now, but we need some backup. With less than fifty days until Election Day we need to be all in.
Having to do things differently this year because of COVID has been a challenge, but we’re taking it on full steam. From phone calls, to texting, to online organizing – we are putting in every effort to make sure we elect West Virginia Democrats this November. Are you able to chip in right now, and help us? We need to raise another $1,340 this week to be on track. Let’s do this! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

You may have seen some of the attacks coming Mike’s way. McCaul wants to say Mike is a “socialist” or “communist” just because he wants everyone to have health care and be able to protect the environment for our children. **These attacks are absurd** — especially during a pandemic, when access to a doctor can mean the difference between life and death, and especially as the West Coast burns and another hurricane season is upon us.
Here’s the thing — we have to make sure our message gets out, and isn’t drowned out by all the outside money McCaul’s wealthy supporters are bringing into the race. We have to let Texans know that my Mike, Mike Siegel, is the only one who is really looking out for regular people like you and me.
Here’s where you come in. I hate to say it, but this campaign will be decided by resources. Some of you have already been so generous. But we need you to dig deep to get us to the finish.

| Hoosier Republican,

Have you heard the big news?

**Our team and grassroots volunteers have now contacted over two million Hoosier voters!**

With less than 50 days out from Election Day, this grassroots work is the activity that will make the difference for victory – including in your community – for our entire Republican team.

Do you care about growing Indiana’s economy – and getting back to setting records?

Do you want to protect the rule of law and defend our constitutional rights?

Do you want to keep Indiana the fiscally responsible home of balanced budgets and a AAA credit rating – and not a Democrat-led home of debt and dysfunction?

**Well, then President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, and attorney general nominee Todd Rokita are counting on your help!**

If you're looking for an easy way to make a big difference in this election, [sign up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bce99a2e4d&e=1acd9bb3d6) to volunteer with your Indiana Republican Party now! Once you sign up, we’ll reach out and get you all the information you need!

We may have now reached two million Hoosier voters, but aren’t taking our foot off the gas.

Let’s keep working hard and take home the checkered flag on Election Day!

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: I Forgot to Tell You
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I was so busy telling you on Friday how Senate Republicans sold us out by not firing Walz' Small Business Hit Squad Chief, Jan Malcolm, that I forgot to tell you the good news... **Another House Democrat came our way on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers.** We went into Friday's vote needing five Democrats to turn against their Party's governor, and we got one more. But getting these remaining four is proving to be quite the feat. That's why Action 4 Liberty is prepared to go directly to the voters in these vulnerable Democratic districts. Some of these Walz' lackeys even have good, conservative opponents who would make great state reps. It's really simple: if we can't end Walz' Emergency Powers during the October Special Session, then legislators MUST pay for it in November's election. This isn't a game. Real lives and fortunes are at stake. We just learned that a small business in Hastings is being fined by Walz' Small Business Hit Squad for nearly $8k because an employee wasn't wearing a mask. It's hard enough for these business to make ends meet after the Governor shut them down for two months, now he's penalizing them for non-compliance with his illegal orders. Challenge Walz' illegal orders and you are likely to find yourself in court or paying large fines. Walz went after Kris Schiffler back in May for opening his restaurant early. Kris was faced with the dilemma: suffer one more week of no revenue and see his business fail or defy the governor and stand a chance of turning a profit. Walz even went after the North Star Stampede Rodeo in Effie. I was chatting with the legislative candidate up there yesterday and it sounds like folks are still fed up with the Governor's overreach in their neck of the woods.
### Is this the Minnesota you want?
Of course the Democrat representatives in these areas could care less that their Party's Governor is harming their constituents. So it's our job to let the voters know the truth! **We're taking our message directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them!** [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=2) Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him. **Equip us with the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz.**
## [EQUIP ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=3)
Last week, we were able to put this commercial in front of over 12,000 voters in Tabke's district. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands more this election season by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=5)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses.
**When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke get kicked to the curb in an election, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. We need to send a very loud message this election season that there will be a heavy price to pay for trampling on our liberties and shuttering our businesses!**
Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality.
[**Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_forgot_to_tell_you&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**

clean_body: | Peter \-- I was so busy telling you on Friday how Senate Republicans sold us out by not firing Walz' Small Business Hit Squad Chief, Jan Malcolm, that I forgot to tell you the good news... Another House Democrat came our way on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. We went into Friday's vote needing five Democrats to turn against their Party's governor, and we got one more. But getting these remaining four is proving to be quite the feat. That's why Action 4 Liberty is prepared to go directly to the voters in these vulnerable Democratic districts. Some of these Walz' lackeys even have good, conservative opponents who would make great state reps. It's really simple: if we can't end Walz' Emergency Powers during the October Special Session, then legislators MUST pay for it in November's election. This isn't a game. Real lives and fortunes are at stake. We just learned that a small business in Hastings is being fined by Walz' Small Business Hit Squad for nearly $8k because an employee wasn't wearing a mask. It's hard enough for these business to make ends meet after the Governor shut them down for two months, now he's penalizing them for non-compliance with his illegal orders. Challenge Walz' illegal orders and you are likely to find yourself in court or paying large fines. Walz went after Kris Schiffler back in May for opening his restaurant early. Kris was faced with the dilemma: suffer one more week of no revenue and see his business fail or defy the governor and stand a chance of turning a profit. Walz even went after the North Star Stampede Rodeo in Effie. I was chatting with the legislative candidate up there yesterday and it sounds like folks are still fed up with the Governor's overreach in their neck of the woods. Is this the Minnesota you want? Of course the Democrat representatives in these areas could care less that their Party's Governor is harming their constituents. So it's our job to let the voters know the truth! We're taking our message directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them! Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him. Equip us with the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz. Last week, we were able to put this commercial in front of over 12,000 voters in Tabke's district. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands more this election season by donating today. | "DONATE" We must turn up the heat on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses. When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke get kicked to the curb in an election, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. We need to send a very loud message this election season that there will be a heavy price to pay for trampling on our liberties and shuttering our businesses! Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. In Liberty, Jake Duesenberg President, Action 4 Liberty Action 4 Liberty · United States

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Friends, Georgia is ground zero to save our democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
Friends,

Georgia is once again the epicenter of the political universe. Not only has Georgia finally achieved swing state status and become one of the most powerful states in the race for the White House, but because of this year's special election we have the power to shape the entire U.S. Senate. And with the power to shape the Senate comes the power to define the Supreme Court, the power to define American Justice itself , for a generation. The fate of the entire country is in our hands, but what else is new? This is the birthplace of the civil rights movement, the capitol of hip hop, the home of the superhero blockbuster. And this November, when we send Donald Trump packing, we’re going to show the entire country the same is true in politics: As Georgia goes, so goes the nation.

But Friends, it’s about more than the races at the top of the ballot.

With your help , we can win the Georgia State House, so the Republicans can’t continue their gerrymandered stranglehold on our state. And that is one of the main reasons we are launching an exciting new organization of devoted democrats and civil rights soldiers—the Georgia Blue Project.

It is imperative that we flip Georgia and the Georgia Blue Project is how we’re going to do it. Friends, donating $26—a dollar for each State House seat we are targeting—or whatever you can afford today will be invaluable in funding the outreach we need to increase turnout among the communities of color, Independent women and youth whose votes will be decisive in our elections this year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1#edit?refcode=91420]

When I ran for U.S. Senate, you were there. My motivation wasn’t only for the opportunity to represent hard working Georgians and their families in Washington. It was also my commitment to building a lasting movement for change across Georgia.

That’s why I’m honored to be joined in this amazing new effort to flip Georgia through the Georgia Blue Project by Judge Glenda Hatchett; Atlanta City Councilman Amir Farokhi; celebrated civil rights attorney Gerald Griggs; former Attorney General candidate Charlie Bailey; and former GA NAACP President and head of New Georgia Project. These are the respected, committed Georgians who have joined me in this cause. The stakes are simply too high for us to sit on the sidelines and not leave everything we’ve got on the playing field. We cannot wake up on November 4th to four more years of Donald Trump.

We must end the lingering effects of the racist and divisive Southern Strategy in Georgia. Donald Trump only won Georgia by 5 points in 2016—and we all know that there is a high likelihood that Stacey Abrams would be our governor today if it wasn’t for the insidious voter purges and suppression we’ve experienced. Since then, over 1.1 million new voters have been added to the voter rolls. We have reached the tipping point—and we are determined to give Georgia a final, decisive push to victory.

Friends, the past four years of Donald Trump and his Republican enablers have been rough. We have lost 200,000 lives to Donald Trump’s willful mismanagement of the coronavirus pandemic. Our economy is devastated, and still, social justice eludes too many. Black Americans are murdered in the streets by vigilantes, shot in their beds because of “no-knock” warrants, and shot in the back by rogue law enforcement officers sworn to protect us. We have witnessed our very democracy dismantled. We must elect people who insist on solutions. We can change this in 2020.

But we can turn our country and our state around. Please stand with us and support the Georgia Blue Project today.

Yours Truly,
Teresa Tomlinson

https://www.facebook.com/georgiablueproject [https://www.facebook.com/georgiablueproject] [] https://www.instagram.com/gablueproject/ [https://www.instagram.com/gablueproject/]

Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Georgia Blue PRoject
PO Box 60558
Philadelphia, PA 19145
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/1742184e-19f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74/7ec9fe12-39f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlYzlmZTEyLTM5ZjgtZWExMS05OWMzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xWnaua5KPHexWtW3oltVOinnHkVmy7F-xYgE5BNENXE=&id=102705779 .

name: MondaireForCongress.com
subject: Mondaire has some big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Our campaign is already hard at work supporting these candidates...
#

Hi there — just wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the big news from Mondaire: he just endorsed _six_ Democratic Congressional candidates across the country.
Our campaign is already hard at work supporting these candidates, while we also fight to make sure Mondaire wins this fall. **[If you could chip in whatever you can to power our movement, Mondaire and I would really appreciate it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19192436/252154762/-1084116692?refcode2=b3a3a5ea-3cf8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200916-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2EzYTVlYS0zY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iECmMSO21EE-ZayJoxwVycQq1oy0--he5k2pim-cz2g=)**
Thanks for your support!
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager
* * *
Friends,
This movement has already made history by showing that an openly gay, Black man running on an unapologetically progressive platform can win a competitive primary in the suburbs of New York — but we can’t stop there.
We must expand the Democratic majority in the House by electing bold, values-driven leaders across the country — in cities, suburbs, and even in historically red districts.
**I am officially endorsing six of my fellow Democratic Congressional candidates:**
* **Dana Balter (NY-24)**
* **Kara Eastman (NE-02)**
* **Georgette Gómez (CA-53)**
* **Jon Hoadley (MI-06)**
* **Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23)**
* **Cameron Webb (VA-05)**

Our team will support these candidates by hosting phone banks, fundraising, and headlining campaign events.
**[Will you make a contribution today to support my campaign and our efforts to elect Democrats nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19192437/252154763/-1084116692?refcode2=b3a3a5ea-3cf8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200916-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2EzYTVlYS0zY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iECmMSO21EE-ZayJoxwVycQq1oy0--he5k2pim-cz2g=)**
I’m so proud to throw my full support behind this slate — which includes candidates of color, LGBTQ+ candidates, and candidates in tough red-to-blue districts. **All six have pledged not to take a dime of corporate PAC money and will come to the table to truly represent the values of America’s diversity — not big corporations and Republican special interests.**
November 3rd is about more than just getting Donald Trump out of office — it’s about rebuilding a better country that works for working people, and I want these leaders beside me as we do just that in the 117th Congress.
**With less than 50 days to go, there’s no time to waste. Your contribution today — of any size — will have a huge impact not just on my race, but on critical races around the country.[Please chip in whatever you can afford to power this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19192438/252154764/-1084116692?refcode2=b3a3a5ea-3cf8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200916-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2EzYTVlYS0zY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iECmMSO21EE-ZayJoxwVycQq1oy0--he5k2pim-cz2g=)**
Thank you for your support. Now let’s get to work to expand our Democratic majority and make history!
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19192439/252154766/-1084116692?refcode2=b3a3a5ea-3cf8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200916-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2EzYTVlYS0zY2Y4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iECmMSO21EE-ZayJoxwVycQq1oy0--he5k2pim-cz2g=)**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: We need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress

Friend,

In 2018, Americans delivered the House of Representatives to Democrats because **our country demanded change from a government that was failing us.** And since then, we have fought every day to enact an agenda for the people.

We’ve fought for accountability and justice from this corrupt administration.

We’ve championed civil rights, passing major voting rights reforms and historic legislation like the Equality Act to protect marginalized people everywhere.

And we’ve led the charge on building a more equitable and affordable health care system, even as Republicans repeatedly tried to gut the Affordable Care Act and strip health care away from millions of Americans.

**In 48 days, we’ll get a chance to deliver an even stronger mandate for change by winning the White House, flipping the Senate, and expanding our House majority -- and we can only do that by electing leaders like Sri Preston Kulkarni, a proven leader for the people of TX-22.**

Growing up in a middle-class household, Sri saw firsthand what a broken health care system can do to everyday families when his father passed away from cancer and the bills from his care almost left his family bankrupt. **Now, he’s fighting for health care reform so no one experiences what he went through.**

And as a foreign service officer serving in countries like Russia and Iran, Sri saw firsthand what American leadership on the world stage can do for democracies around the world -- and what happens when we abandon our values and turn our backs on our allies. **Now, he’s running to bring that experience to Congress and restore our standing in global diplomacy.**

We need Sri in Congress, friend -- and we need a new, vibrant freshman class full of experienced leaders like Sri to expand our House majority and finally deliver the change we need on issues like health care and our economy.

body:

---
| Team,

For the past 6 weeks, our GOP opponent and Republican super PACs have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars on TV ads lying about Max.

**So we 're setting the record straight with an ad that shows exactly what this toss-up race comes down to and exactly whose heart is in this fight for the people.**

[**Take 30 seconds to watch "All the Ways" here, then help make sure more voters see it by helping us raise $10,308 to fund our newest TV ad. >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=25) | [Learn the Truth »](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=25)
---
We shipped this ad to TV stations this week, because with all of the negative spending in our race, voters urgently needed to know the truth about Max.

**But frankly, we 're facing a budget gap of $10,308, and if we can't get that money in the door by midnight, we won't be able to keep this ad running. **

[**So once you 've had a chance to watch "All the Ways" yourself, chip in any amount to help us raise $10,308 and hold the line against the attacks on Max that have been pouring into this district. >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=25)

[Donate $250 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=250) | [Custom »](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/kJfJK1SyCuc7fvc9LrGUJQqoUbIiUJTLbJRpgsVBBZg=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=35)
Remember -- we only have until midnight to close this fundraising gap, so please chip in immediately! Thank you so much.

_\-- Max Rose for Congress_

When Max Rose put on the uniform, he put it all on the line for our country. Now he's one of the most vulnerable members of Congress, and he needs your support to continue putting country over politics.

[**Will you chip in $11 to help re-elect Max to represent NY-11?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/c75vMhRukn0Wr-2Dg-eUGPKCBxoLYsJ0_RlcdmYlVxM=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=11) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/NlqUG-a64DildOjC0m2a53N3uScMblg8gbrvN7RJT5U=/c75vMhRukn0Wr-2Dg-eUGPKCBxoLYsJ0_RlcdmYlVxM=?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.16_b1_rhq_conole&amount=11)

name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: Our final full quarter ends this month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
When the next finance reports are released, they need to show good news for MJ.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4e/7f51f7bc/450cb490/4efa1b9d/458224745/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4e/7f51f7bc/450cb490/4efa1b9c/458224745/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200916.1nd__2101__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

The end of this month marks the end of our _final_ full fundraising quarter before the election. When the next finance reports are released, everyone is going to be clued in to how strong this campaign is in the final stretch before Election Day. We need your help to make sure we have good news to report for MJ's campaign!

In order to ensure we have the resources we need to keep competing with Sen. Cornyn between now and Election Day, **we've set a one day goal of raising $45,000** before midnight tonight!
[DONATE TO HELP US REACH IT](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4e/7f51f7bc/450cb490/4efa1b9c/458224745/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200916.1nd__2101__&amount=10")
---
With the polls tightening, **we can't start falling behind now**. We need to keep our momentum going, make sure our final finance reports reflect the true strength of this campaign, and give this fight everything we've got between now and November 3rd!

**If you can, please make a donation to help us reach our goal before tonight's midnight deadline and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn on Election Day:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4e/7f51f7bc/450cb490/4efa1b91/458224745/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200916.1nd__2101__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4e/7f51f7bc/450cb490/4efa1b90/458224745/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200916.1nd__2101__&amount=50")**

MJ Hegar Senior Staff

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Sneak peek at our very first TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0ffe40af9699/sneak-peek-at-our-very-first-tv-ad?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
It’s official: our very first TV ad is done. Thanks to donors like you, we were able to produce not just an ad, but a great one. I am so incredibly proud of this ad — this is me, and it’s the root of why I’m running for Congress. We’ve had such a tremendous outpouring of support from the people of IL-16 and donors all across the county, and I am ready to take this district back for them. As a token of our appreciation, I am giving you the first look at it:
---
| [Click here to view our first TV ad](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c1ef9d616a&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to view our first TV ad")
---
| However, we need a little help. Now that the ad is made, we have to get it on the air and KEEP it on the air. My team told me that we need to raise an additional $20,000 by the end of the week to make this happen. My opponent is already flooding the airwaves, so it is important that we get our ad out there ASAP. And, now that you have seen what a wonderful job the production team did, I am sure that you agree with me that we shouldn’t let their work go to waste. **Every donation we receive will help us get our message out to voters across all five media markets in this big district.** [Can I count on you to chip in and get our brand new ad on TV?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e5fc8bb170&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Team Hunt for a Day of Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

With less than 50 days until Election Day, we need your help spreading Wesley's message of protecting our way of life to voters throughout the 7th District.

That's why this Saturday at 10:00am, we're hosting our first **Day of Action!**

Our campaign will be blockwalking, phone banking and text banking to our neighbors and fellow 7th District voters about the importance of defending our energy jobs, supporting our police officers and supporting Wesley Hunt at the ballot box.

Join us this Saturday at 10:00am at our headquarters of 11511 Katy Freeway #105, Houston, TX 77079 to help us defeat Lizzie Fletcher!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=47f5bd6664e7439da40cad9c08999a4d&_e=rSx7dSWFglla1m_VpRcSU-Uq_yQqj2ivI7I7FFI477oxrhW0bYZx0T7sVih5Ae_Zj-baFHg40atMSotxtZoE8V1FeSmLxsTgZ5yOpun5zGnkNCRThqpF8OVdSsQsL65pNaaLunvqZhNAQJdNa962Tye4eVDLn0NLyl9JZ5hjTxFZCNV-f1ZFv1Ov17-9UyQyZ8Zf-GbfPXpS49y8iH7fooG18iTfc6DH0Z3lJPKVBxD7vv3SuF8NELooTgfZVuhlWPtZ0rH2_SRiOUUH6E664ZYgUTZ0xmzaWuqkosS0mNM%3D)****

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Back the Blue!
body:
They need to know we stand by them
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-bsVtucjp55D1M-NjKUhm7Byf0NAbcIBo1ZV-piA-vnKTmAHWLw15qz4N74ouRq_fkGKsGWg-VLqu-rM5SwHyDXttxqPSY8zCCYvLu2br0V0yPVPJEpxJIoh4TuVhjWjCQpAtfHHqGdCXIYGdmLvdcVy9eXX7MsIZ7RSsDUoNWgzTGOI1tZVqYKcQTDr5VWD&c=98pwhl8CtC8gencK7Q8_h19nAg7053G1EcALnpmgTQr7ySs8WEeqCw==&ch=75ZviJbOPwF2x4RJRMjzlCpSFr_0ktDx103tnzOPSEZEqIm1i4EE4g==)
---
| Friend,
I want to take a few minutes of your time to talk about something that is near and dear to my heart, our law enforcement officers.
As the wife of a first responder, I understand firsthand what these brave men and women have to go through to keep our communities safe.
It breaks my heart to see how the liberal media and the radical elite have demonized our law enforcement officers and have made them the enemy. They are not the enemy. They are the patriots responsible for keeping us safe.
Now more than ever, they need to know we stand by them. [Will you help me back the blue by signing this petition?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-bsVtucjp55D1M-NjKUhm7Byf0NAbcIBo1ZV-piA-vnKTmAHWLw15qz4N74ouRq_fkGKsGWg-VLqu-rM5SwHyDXttxqPSY8zCCYvLu2br0V0yPVPJEpxJIoh4TuVhjWjCQpAtfHHqGdCXIYGdmLvdcVy9eXX7MsIZ7RSsDUoNWgzTGOI1tZVqYKcQTDr5VWD&c=98pwhl8CtC8gencK7Q8_h19nAg7053G1EcALnpmgTQr7ySs8WEeqCw==&ch=75ZviJbOPwF2x4RJRMjzlCpSFr_0ktDx103tnzOPSEZEqIm1i4EE4g==)

| When someone calls 911, these brave patriots in uniform jump to action, risking their lives to ensure whoever is on the other line is safe. They are selfless, brave, and honorable people. We need to stop punishing them for the actions of the very few who have betrayed the badge.
Please, [sign my petition](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-bsVtucjp55D1M-NjKUhm7Byf0NAbcIBo1ZV-piA-vnKTmAHWLw15qz4N74ouRq_fkGKsGWg-VLqu-rM5SwHyDXttxqPSY8zCCYvLu2br0V0yPVPJEpxJIoh4TuVhjWjCQpAtfHHqGdCXIYGdmLvdcVy9eXX7MsIZ7RSsDUoNWgzTGOI1tZVqYKcQTDr5VWD&c=98pwhl8CtC8gencK7Q8_h19nAg7053G1EcALnpmgTQr7ySs8WEeqCw==&ch=75ZviJbOPwF2x4RJRMjzlCpSFr_0ktDx103tnzOPSEZEqIm1i4EE4g==) to show our Thin Blue Line that we stand with them!

| Thank you for your support. Showing our law enforcement we stand by them can bring real change to our nation.
Respectfully,

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e840/77d4c309/21b415a8/2635fead/1664654326/VEsP/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e840/77d4c309/21b415a8/2635feac/1664654326/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e840/77d4c309/21b415a8/2635feaf/1664654326/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Our HUGE end of the quarter deadline is only 2 weeks away! In order to ensure we are prepared for the final stretch of this campaign , we need to raise $22,400 before the filing deadline at 11:59 p.m. on September 30th! Please help us defeat Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House and send a New Mexico First senator to Washington, DC, | | | Our campaign is OVERWHELMINGLY funded by New Mexicans like you, and we need our supporters to step up so we can finish this race strong. Ben Ray Lujan has millions of DC, California and New York dollars behind him and he is willing to lie about our campaign to win. If you are one of our supporters who can afford to give a bit more, | | | Thank you for tremendous support during the final stretch of this campaign. I promise, every day I’m giving this campaign all I’ve got and having you beside me means the world to us. Mark P.S. If you are donating for the first time or you have donated multiple times before, I hope that you please consider setting up a recurring donation. Recurring donations help us budget effectively and allow us to make bigger, grander plans for the future. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

Friends, I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of the BEST mayor in NYC’s history, Rudy Giuliani.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=301A483A1A6395)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

We’ve seen first hand the disastrous policies of Mayor Bill de Blasio and its impact on New York City. So why would we vote for a candidate for Congress who joined de Blasio is supporting the disastrous bail reform and closing Rikers, caved to the defunding the NYPD mob and covers for de Blasio’s rapid increases to property taxes.

While Max sides with de Blasio on issue after issue, I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of the BEST mayor in NYC’s history, Rudy Giuliani.
[Watch Rudy's message and donate:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=301A483A1A6396)

| | Mayor Rudy Giuliani is right.

The far-left Democrats are attacking our way of life, attempting to dismantle America one representative at a time. And that’s why Nancy Pelosi has invested millions into our community to support puppet Max Rose who has rubber-stamped 97% of her agenda.

Make no mistake... A vote for Max Rose is a vote for Nancy Pelosi.

We need someone in Congress who will represent our values in Washington and in less than 50 days, we have our last opportunity to preserve America or lose her to Pelosi’s swamp.

[There’s so much at stake, and we all must be ALL-IN to succeed. We can’t let Nancy Pelosi and her special interest groups buy and lie their way to victory. Please chip in $5, $25, or even $100 so our campaign has the resources in the final stretch to WIN.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=301A483A1A6398)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Media Pushes Unverified Gossip to Hide Trump’s Amazing Economic and Foreign Policy Achievements
body:
The Democrat-media complex has a new mission: to distract our attention from President Trump’s incredible—and I mean incredible—progress | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db47b61d3b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Media Pushes Unverified Gossip to Hide Trump’s Amazing Economic and Foreign Policy Achievements**

“The Democrat-media complex has a new mission: to distract our attention from President Trump’s incredible—and I mean incredible—progress on both economic and foreign policy,” Andy Puzder writes in _The Federalist._

“Clearly, these hit pieces were never intended to be rational or believable—and they weren’t. Rather, they were carefully crafted and timed to draw attention away from the most remarkable economic comeback in American history and unprecedented progress towards peace in the Middle East.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68650a4477&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In 2019, American households saw the biggest jump in real median income in at least 52 years, and the poverty rate hit its lowest level since at least 1959, according to a new Census report. “The absence press coverage is even more astounding when you consider that the gains were among lower-income families, women, blacks and Hispanics,” the [_Issues & Insights_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0232b73f5&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “If the nation’s police officers walked off the job today, it would be hard to blame them. Sunday’s anti-cop riots in Lancaster, Pa., have made the current de facto rules of engagement clear,” Manhattan Institute Fellow Heather Mac Donald writes. “Virtually the entirety of the Democratic political class stayed silent this summer as cops became punching bags for criminals and anarchists.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4503594fe&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Nowhere is President Trump’s commitment to expanding opportunity more evident than at Second Chances Farm in Delaware. “Second Chances Farm is a distillation of two of the president's key priorities: creating job opportunities for low-income Americans and reforming the criminal justice system,” write HUD Secretary Ben Carson and Scott Turner of the White House Opportunity and Revitalization Council in [_Delaware Online_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9c9204c43c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89e7e62e0f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04b3c303ce&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=abc5adb95a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

**🚨 URGENT MESSAGE FOR Peter 🚨**

As a dedicated conservative and member of Team Marsha, we promised to keep you in the loop for good and bad. Unfortunately, Peter, this is bad.

We just got our mid-month finance report and we fell just short of our goal.

Marsha set aggressive goals in order to ensure Republicans have the resources necessary to go toe-to-toe with the radical Left and because she knows the best grassroots team in the nation is capable of rising to the occasion.

She knows that we can close the gap, **so Marsha has extended the deadline and secured 5X matching in order to meet our goal.** _DON 'T wait to act on this -- there are less than 50 days left to the election and **every dollar counts.** _

[**5X RUSH DONATE >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NzEzMTQS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTM5MjAzNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_**The Left is winning, Peter. **_

Peter, we took a deeper look into the numbers -- Democrats are massively ahead in fundraising. Radical mega-donors like Billionaire Mike Bloomberg are flooding the airwaves with liberal propaganda and attacks against Republicans.

We beat Billionaire Bloomberg and his rich socialist friends before, and we can do it again -- but we need help, Peter.

The Silent Majority MUST speak up before it's too late!

CONTRIBUTE NOW TO DEFEND THE WHITE HOUSE AND SENATE

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19200580/252189709/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUzMDBhNy01YmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlCq8xqqnoHUHJBxdSYdEW6L1rhFNKBiffJIYoUcXBA=&emci=df79692f-48f8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=b8e300a7-5bf8-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
Friend,

Yesterday was the start of Hispanic Heritage Month -- and a special time to be a part of Team Gómez, where we're working on a historical campaign to elect the first LGBTQ Latina to Congress!

But this campaign isn't just about making history -- it's about building a stronger future for everyone.

From the COVID-19 pandemic to our climate crisis to a nationwide movement to achieve justice, we need to meet the moment and elect leaders who will solve these problems with progressive policies. We need someone who has been in the trenches as an activist and an organizer for decades, fighting for environmental justice and battling against the Trump administration. And someone who has never forgotten her Barrio roots.

By electing Georgette, we are breaking down historical barriers, and we can keep that up when she's in Congress. **We can't afford to wait for progressive policies -- we need Georgette in Congress now.**

**[We've got a goal of raising $7,500 by tonight in grassroots donations, and we're a little over halfway there. Can you chip in to help elect our progressive champion, Georgette?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19200582/252189711/-132536200?refcode=em20_200916_midmonth2_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUzMDBhNy01YmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlCq8xqqnoHUHJBxdSYdEW6L1rhFNKBiffJIYoUcXBA=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19200584/252189714/-132536200?refcode=em20_200916_midmonth2_in&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUzMDBhNy01YmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlCq8xqqnoHUHJBxdSYdEW6L1rhFNKBiffJIYoUcXBA=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19200586/252189715/-132536200?refcode=em20_200916_midmonth2_in&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUzMDBhNy01YmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlCq8xqqnoHUHJBxdSYdEW6L1rhFNKBiffJIYoUcXBA=)

There's no time to waste when it comes to health care reform -- over 700,000 Californians have been infected with the coronavirus. We must ensure every single person has access to affordable health care WITHOUT worrying about paying the bills.

There's no time to waste when it comes to climate change -- not with massive wildfires raging across our state causing incredible damage that can't be undone. We desperately need the Green New Deal to finally confront climate change with a solution that is scaled to meet the problem.

**There is absolutely no time to waste on social, racial, and economic justice.**

Our district represents a diverse community that looks out for one another. We wear masks to protect one another, buy local to support one another, and elect leaders who will support us through good times and bad. **Leaders like Georgette.**

**[Donate to Georgette by midnight to help us reach our fundraising goals. With your support now, we can elect the progressive champion we need to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19200596/252189727/-132536200?refcode=em20_200916_midmonth2_in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGUzMDBhNy01YmY4LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlCq8xqqnoHUHJBxdSYdEW6L1rhFNKBiffJIYoUcXBA=)**

It's an honor to be in this fight for you -- now let's get Georgette elected, together.

\-- Team Gómez
