name: Team Cotton
subject: Tom Cotton: Netflix's 'Cuties' is child pornography hiding in plain sight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
The Netflix movie “Cuties” is the latest example of child sexual exploitation in the film industry. In fact, it is child pornography hiding in plain sight.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43471166&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTM5MTE3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
The sexual exploitation of children should never be excused.

But the liberal Hollywood elite are showing that they are willing to turn a blind eye when it occurs in the film industry.

A new movie distributed to millions of Americans by the streaming service Netflix is the latest example of this pornographic exploitation in Hollywood.

Check out Tom’s latest opinion piece for Fox News about the problem and his calls to end it.

- Team Cotton Sen. Tom Cotton: Netflix's 'Cuties' is child pornography hiding in plain sight - it is Hollywood exploitation

The Netflix film is a vivid reminder that children ought to be protected from sexual abuse and exploitation By Sen. Tom Cotton People can disagree about all manner of issues – and in America, we certainly do. One thing that shouldn’t be up for debate is that young children ought to be protected from sexual abuse and exploitation.

Hollywood has long failed this fundamental moral test, as evidenced by the many child stars who were abused by their supposed caretakers, both on and off the set.

The Netflix movie “Cuties” is the latest example of child sexual exploitation in the film industry.

In fact, it is child pornography hiding in plain sight.

“Cuties” follows a group of 11-year-old girls in France who form a dance group. The girls mimic and adopt highly sexualized behavior they see in popular culture, from Internet pornography to (hardly less explicit) music videos. The movie’s child actresses were made to wear, do and say disgusting things in service of this plot.

The director of “Cuties,” Netflix and a disturbing number of film critics have defended the film since its promotional materials first prompted outrage. They claim the film is a “social commentary against the sexualization of young children.” The film isn’t contributing to the sexualization of children, these critics insist, it’s critiquing it.

But of course, no matter how interesting the movie’s “social commentary” is to critics at the Sundance film festival, that doesn’t excuse the fact that the movie depicts real-life children performing extended, pornographic dance routines. I choose that word carefully, because ultimately what ”Cuties” depicts is child pornography.

Federal law defines child pornography to include the “lascivious exhibition” of a child’s private parts. There is no nudity requirement under the statute. Certain images in this film technically satisfy the federal definition of child pornography. Its distribution by Netflix likely constitutes a serious crime.

Tragically, ”Cuties” is not the first film Netflix has streamed featuring child pornography.

In 2018, it was criticized for streaming a foreign film that featured a 9-year-old girl simulating a sex act – a simulated sex act that is squarely covered by the child pornography statute. The company has also come under fire for its series "Big Mouth," which includes cartoon depictions of children's genitals.

Some will defend these gross depictions as “art” or constitutionally protected speech, but directors do not have carte blanche to break the law just because they call themselves “artists.” And the Constitution does not protect the sexual exploitation of children; to the contrary, our laws are meant to protect children from exploitation.

Netflix has a basic legal responsibility to not stream child pornography or otherwise promote the sexual exploitation of children. Even if one were to argue these images don’t quite meet the threshold or barely meet the threshold of constituting child pornography, the fact we must even engage in this argument surely implies the images are, at best, indecent.

Equally important is Netflix’s moral duty to ensure that it does not disseminate obscene and lewd material featuring children, whether legal or not.

This duty falls with equal weight on the many elites and celebrities who work with Netflix and are getting rich off its streaming empire.

No less prominent a couple than former President Barack Obama and his wife, Michelle Obama, stand to make $65 million from a Netflix deal to film their life stories, and the Duke and Duchess of Sussex signed a deal some estimate to be $150 million to create “family programming.”

These leaders have the influence and indeed obligation to put pressure on Netflix to remove lewd and disgusting material like ”Cuties.” They are otherwise complicit.

At the same time, the Department of Justice ought to investigate this film to determine whether it can bring charges against Netflix for distributing child pornography.

The film and entertainment industries have exploited children for decades with few consequences. It’s little surprise, then, that so many in the industry responded with defensiveness and shock to the outrage over “Cuties” – but it’s no excuse.

We all have a duty to protect the children under our care. When adults fail in that duty, young lives are harmed, predators are emboldened, and society itself is coarsened as a consequence.

No “art” or “social commentary” can justify such a moral outrage. Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0NzExNjYS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTM5MTE3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43471166&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MTM5MTE3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call (Republicans want you to delete this email)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The RGA is hoping you don't read this email.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8148%2E868730%2EfZyD9r) Friend, Our deadline is tonight -- and we're short of our $25,000 goal. Now this is a real goal, meant to beat back against the multimillion-dollar war chest that the Republican Governors Association has on hand to unseat me. They haven't released any fundraising numbers since early 2020, but the news then was grim: a $14.1 million haul, making it the most successful quarter in a presidential election year. That's on top of the $200 million they raised in 2018 and 2019. The RGA would love if you assumed this race was in the bag and deleted this email -- it's how Republicans won in 2016, after all. We can't take this for granted. The cavalry is not coming -- there is no one here but us to win this race and keep Washington state safe from my Trump-loving opponent who will put politics and profits over people's health and progress. If we want to win, we have 30 days to make our case -- and time is running out. **Washingtonians begin voting exactly one month from today, and we have to make every single day count.[We're short of our $25,000 goal by just $5,478. Will you donate $5 or more before tonight's midnight deadline to close the gap?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11191?t=4&akid=8148%2E868730%2EfZyD9r)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11302?t=5&akid=8148%2E868730%2EfZyD9r)

clean_body: The RGA is hoping you don't read this email. | Friend, Our deadline is tonight -- and we're short of our $25,000 goal. Now this is a real goal, meant to beat back against the multimillion-dollar war chest that the Republican Governors Association has on hand to unseat me. They haven't released any fundraising numbers since early 2020, but the news then was grim: a $14.1 million haul, making it the most successful quarter in a presidential election year. That's on top of the $200 million they raised in 2018 and 2019. The RGA would love if you assumed this race was in the bag and deleted this email -- it's how Republicans won in 2016, after all. We can't take this for granted. The cavalry is not coming -- there is no one here but us to win this race and keep Washington state safe from my Trump-loving opponent who will put politics and profits over people's health and progress. If we want to win, we have 30 days to make our case -- and time is running out. Washingtonians begin voting exactly one month from today, and we have to make every single day count. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Very truly yours, Jay

Asking you for money is my least favorite thing to do, but it has become more important than ever in these final weeks of my campaign. The attacks from the Far Left continue to get worse each and every day. The only way my campaign can fight back against the lies is with your help.
With only 48 days until election day, we are almost at the finish line. I hope I can count on your continued support!
Thank you for everything,
Susan Collins

If we’re going to make this goal, we need to raise $4,582 TODAY, and we need your help to do it. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = The end of this month marks the LAST quarter of the election cycle, so we NEED to hit this goal ― there’s no extra time to catch up. That means we need all hands on deck if we’re going to finish out this race, team. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your help, Team Siegel | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: Please join Secretary John Kerry and Margaret Good tomorrow evening, Friend

body:
Hi friend, As one of our campaign’s strongest supporters, we wanted to be sure you knew about this exciting upcoming event!

Hi friend,

Please join us for a climate call to action tomorrow, September 17th at 5:30pm EDT. The event will feature special guests: Robert Bunting, Robert Corell, Mayor Rick Kriseman, Terry Root, Tiernan Sittenfeld, Rep. Eric Swalwell, Dawn Wright and a musical performance by Dar Williams.
We are also excited to announce **former Secretary of State John Kerry will be joining the event!** Secretary Kerry was an architect of the Paris Climate Accord and is currently the co-lead of Joe Biden's Climate Task Force. He understands the importance of mobilizing Americans and citizens everywhere to tackle climate change, and we're excited to have his support.

name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: How To Vote in 2020: State by State Guides
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2170)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red White & True News... How To Vote in 2020: State by State Guides
---
| | With Election Day just 48 days away, agitators are doing everything they can to change the rules and confuse voters on how to vote in this election. In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2181), True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht announces the release of True the Vote's [state-by-state infographics](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2182) as a resource for voters to learn about their state's election processes, key dates, and requirements.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2181)
---
| | Download your state's voting guide. Each state infographic lists important voter information, including when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls. Every state has different processes. Visit the [interactive map](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2182) on the True the Vote website to access your state's infographic, download, print, and share.

Make a plan to vote in person. It's the best way to ensure your vote counts. And share that information with your friends and family. Despite Democrats' push for a mail-in election, the U.S. Postal Service warned us recently that it "cannot guarantee all ballots cast by mail for the November election will arrive in time to be counted, even if mailed by state deadlines, raising the possibility that millions of voters could be disenfranchised." ([Associated Press](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2183), "Post Office warns states across US about mail voting," 8/15/2020)

Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=234A492A20A2181) on our YouTube page.

---

name: Rita Hart for Congress
subject: This is an American issue

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cwR0paVzg0cP_HWrtkd01iCkaL4nyskjmQtR5IZ1jso=/mEjTyzlAj2i17M4Ga8_OGZOYKwshSOTG3HaesJzwB6U=?refcode=200916-email) The United States Postal Service is a lifeline for many Americans -- especially for those living in rural areas during the COVID-19 crisis. Millions rely on the Postal Service for everything from mail-in ballots to life-saving medications. The USPS is struggling right now, and we want to know what the people of IA-02 think -- **should Congress pass funding to preserve the USPS?** | ****[YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/cwR0paVzg0cP_HWrtkd01iCkaL4nyskjmQtR5IZ1jso=/bqVev_Mnsn7qGfBipgDxsdwQCuKJEtBMpyMYc-XmvWM=?refcode=200916-email)****

---
Losing the USPS during a public health crisis could be devastating to millions of Americans. Many rely on it to keep in touch with loved ones, to stay up-to-date on the latest news and to receive life-saving medications without the risk or inconvenience of going to the pharmacy.
This shouldn't be a Democrat vs Republican issue -- it's an American issue. **Let us know if you 're okay with Congress passing funding to keep the United States Postal Service functioning!**
****[YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/cwR0paVzg0cP_HWrtkd01iCkaL4nyskjmQtR5IZ1jso=/bqVev_Mnsn7qGfBipgDxsdwQCuKJEtBMpyMYc-XmvWM=?refcode=200916-email)****

\-- Rita Hart for Congress

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: 49 days away
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTmZBd0wwyHCnSqbUt69U6ZpGp1OMnaPzb9PfH3tT4Raz_mZc60AwC9hMWZJh896DrBlT094J_n22PM3c3eAMLX-p-Co5n_F_XlMTYGEiGBbOenB4gGjFN3HiH_wJecBfW/358/gcOhVwLKQgacjUgq6wms5Q/h0/PROGt72nmoGlXzCE5S78i2ey79aauZ6u-SoZuq5TO68) Team —

If you’ve been following our efforts, you know that we’re hot on Trump’s tail, speaking to the communities that surround his campaign rally stops in the days before he arrives.

First, we hit the city of Manchester, NH before Trump’s scheduled rally on August 15. We saw an immediate reaction, with 19% of our target audience engaging with our content. Next, we broadcasted our efforts to Latrobe, PA and Freeland, MI and struck engagement rates of 12%+ among conservatives.

Trump is becoming more reckless by the day. His rally in Las Vegas on Sunday night brought thousands of people indoors with no social distancing and very few masks. It has never been more important to communicate the risks of attending these events.

This week, Trump will be visiting Mosinee, WI and Bemidji, MN, and we’ll have put in several days of work before he arrives.

We approach each of these communities, and the abundance of Trump supporters within them, with the facts about COVID-19. Simultaneously, on their television screens, Trump acts like COVID-19 has gone away.

Many of those who support him, do so despite the understanding that COVID presents a legitimate threat to their safety.

**It is still here. It is still a threat. And it has killed nearly 200,000 Americans**.

As the election gets closer, the window to flip Trump supporters gets smaller — yet there are many among them who still find a foot in either aisle. We need your help to reach them quickly, persuasively, and on a large enough scale to flip those who can still be flipped.

**When you make a contribution today, you help us do our part in this election**. We will not reach every persuadable name in the voter file, but for those we reach **through your support** , our conversion rate will be remarkably high.

******[ $10 alone can push our content to 1,500 Pennsylvanians. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkTga2AmJMSlaOpQL1qSVV_6EV7hEc0E--YmlgM23B_0q2eFBTKvmxO6fVe_YHfSsZRl-Hv0Yn_oJOIIymiWdEppDlr2hZf2P_yw6WgXixtfjknjTdbqe628lXDK_sszExT1rSUKF5NXmq7HrtN8B9p3t6I9E4ZPgXBOVD1tp2ZYdzFn4CfAxByILYM9KwrM9s2hmROI8gf5TP0V8cWD-eDmb-NYOxd4jiBDnuy6j42z1wKw5oeLesCo0lfvy0RwXTxXOFJYgMS3_UhfedXIO4Z_HCeJEYMM4lo2kMfYvwi5b/358/gcOhVwLKQgacjUgq6wms5Q/h1/QcbDo6QoHazGr_ES3tPM1ShH3T4Jr5acjWX-yjWwmMg) subject: Thank you! Now, let's get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:

---

**THANK YOU**

It's official. John Carney is the Democratic candidate for Governor. We'd like to thank all of you for your hard work and support that got us to this point.

**To make sure we keep confronting the threat of COVID-19 - and taking the science seriously - we need to elect John Carney for a second term as Delaware 's Governor. **

Can you help us ensure John is elected as Governor in November?
* Review your registration status at [ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/EUi_qPvjw9zUEXYgYI1nHA==/laYCFI3EI17vZcFXVXwNMw==)
* Sign up to [volunteer](https://act.myngp.com/el/EUi_qPvjw9zUEXYgYI1nHA==/x3tzKXZglYZWGmjWTZbWhA==)

Let's get to work, and thanks again for your continued support,

Team Carney

body:

| |

| |
#
Hi Team Dani,

I'll be quick. **We need you to help us make calls to voters this weekend.** We only have 48 days left, and hitting our voter contact goals will be what propels us to victory.

Can you help us contact thousands of voters this weekend? We'll get you set up with everything you need to make calls for Dani! [Just click here to sign up for a time that works best for you. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8c2abc65b9&e=140a9b81e7)

Even if you only have an hour or two this weekend to dedicate to making calls for Dani, I promise you it will make a huge difference!

If you haven't made calls for a candidate before, our team will walk you through everything you need to know and we'll be on standby with any questions you may have. We _need _your help to make this weekend a success.

Dave McCarver
Team Dani

Friend,

Are you planning on voting absentee?

We know that many Lowcountry voters are considering voting absentee in 2020 due to COVID-19, and I wanted to reach out and make sure that you had all the resources you need to apply for and send in your absentee ballot.

I won’t mince words — there’s a lot at stake in 2020, and it’s never been more important to make your voice heard at the ballot box.

**The future of the Lowcountry is on the line, and we’re counting on you to help us send a leader to Congress who will never fail to put the Lowcountry FIRST (Nancy Mace, of course!). **

The Lowcountry has suffered from a lack of leadership on Capitol Hill and we need to right the ship now — we can’t wait another 2 years.

_If you’re planning on voting absentee, please use the link below to make sure your voice is heard. Every vote counts and Nancy is counting on you to make an impact in 2020. _

**[Apply for an absentee ballot>>>](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=13194d49fb5140f898058addee4988fd&_e=Qs8AQsls1ewpacU_WG_1SiDOAazR50ATgn7j-pu8LHIx5etTjxv6Qs3nTWIga_H2zVaagihWJcLzlgyaZ75oin-LiBs3iTZnb1KvBc915IwWUSJmjJjJEv1aOwWXPGd0TMIth-8fD_2bSsgHlde0ePWfOUv9G8G0nYqPoFqzfPBXNrCF43182BxfwoJIecAdwJbnLB2fy40rtc-hMeB2Qy-gAS-pMNCd9NYoCLaWcqx-gJUjXr32kCuxm1g4xE9xQlDBtqG_MwbPCXrcAynwWh9Et9JLcQZJAnxlTVLLYY4-HEok7_uEQnD15IrynL2lloT37-qfmqTSrqVx-ZopPFBkKybWRC9-ACpqv9fFBHGSEiKO5udvSxOZLrwhW11fCMBbm3xCAMhkLvKy2sp22wk-NLXdncLIo99qUciDuEehPf4NLZ6RPJVqlY3WPUjWG5hppfecn1dg3uw2lwC9uNxO28KV_J8aCJlzyG19smFk7Q8QiE9np4s18ZQP7ix3jsoTLG46sIMPVAlrgyRfTxbgYAh4uk5ivc8w7YjJ0gA%3D)**

Thank you for voting for Nancy - we couldn’t appreciate your support anymore.

Sincerely,

Mara Mellstrom

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: SIGN ON: Tell Sen. Cornyn to agree to more debates!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texas voters deserve to hear from him.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de2/3614393237/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Texans are on the frontlines of some of the biggest challenges our country faces -- the COVID-19 pandemic, a health care crisis, the fallout of climate change, a struggling economy, and more.

**Texas voters deserve to hear both MJ _and_ Senator John Cornyn debate their plans for tackling these problems. That's why MJ has agreed to three debates.**

Sen. Cornyn -- well, he hasn't had to face his voters for a long time. So far, he's agreed to only _one_ debate. He said he'd be "happy" to do more -- let's see if he will stand by that.

The debates are set -- now it's up to Sen. Cornyn to muster the courage to answer to Texas voters for once, instead of the special interests.

**[Will you sign our petition and let Sen. Cornyn know that Texans deserve to know where he stands on the things that matter to us?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de1/3614393237/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-debatespetition")** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de1/3614393237/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-debatespetition")
---
\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de0/3614393237/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200916.2__2126__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de7/3614393237/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMjYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2126&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f4b/7f51f7bc/45028967/4efa1de6/3614393237/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Martin Sheen
subject: Abigail needs our support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Hello Peter,

My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet on The West Wing.

I don't have the kind of (fictional) power that I used to have as a (fictional) president. But I've devoted my life outside of acting to political activism by doing everything I can to support the causes and candidates that I believe in, like Abigail Spanberger.

Peter, it's not every day that you meet a candidate like Abigail. She is the kind of leader that we tried to portray in The West Wing's best moments -- inspiring, hard working, and dedicated to facing challenges head on and getting results.

**[Right now, I 'm reaching out to you because Abigail has an important fundraising deadline coming up on the 30th. Will you join me in supporting Abigail at this key moment in her campaign by contributing $25?](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)**
---
| [Rush a donation to support Abigail ](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)
---
To get a little personal, politics to me is about hope. It's about our children being able to experience a brighter, more just tomorrow because of what we fight for today. And that starts with voting.

Elections are a time where we come together as a country to decide whether or not the politics of our present represent who we are as Americans or if we've gone too far off track. In 2018, it was the American people who decided that enough was enough and elected one of the most diverse freshman classes into the House of Representatives.

And now, as we inch closer to November 2020, perhaps the most consequential election of our lifetimes, we are once again taking our voices to the ballot box. And Peter, I can't picture a better person to represent VA-07 than Abigail.

Abigail's determination and commitment to fighting for VA-07 is evident in her career and her character. She will bring values that are sorely needed to Washington and work to make life better for VA-07.

I've never run for office. But I've seen a lot of campaigns up close, so I know it's not easy. **[Abigail needs all the support we can give her to win her election in November, so we can't let her miss a single fundraising deadline between now and then.](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)**
Thank you,

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)

Martin Sheen

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/Pt4BENqqsNQIildjjnuSEPx4A8GHBPdRfybJZX-BkkE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20200916-1-EM&amount=25)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/A8kYPVlwxl4Fcy6PqHDvkGJmnCr7YUgxL0OfZI4ddc4=/rgPWbIoTJU86wFMr8TkqXvfvRobrZIqD42q7ZZiCT7o=).

body:

| | Hey Team – We have some exciting news: our campaign was just selected by Georgia’s Blue Project as a targeted race. **That means our race is getting extra focus and a national spotlight to help us flip this district and defeat Barry Loudermilk!** | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=dc89806a19&e=e25784ff28)
---

But let's be honest , with all this extra attention on our race, it means Dana is going to have an even bigger target on her back. Loudermillk knows we’re a threat, and this latest news just proves that he has something to be worried about. **The only way that we can flip this seat is if we have the support and enthusiasm to combat the lies being spewed by Barry’s campaign.**

[**After an announcement like this, the first 48 hours are absolutely critical. Our opponent will be watching, and we have to make sure to show that we can capitalize on this momentum. Can we count on you to make an express donation right now and help us flip this seat? **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=583bc9504e&e=e25784ff28)

name: Team Warner
subject: Announcing our Pig Roast special guests
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Dr. Jill Biden will be joining us on Thursday!
|
---

| | Derek --

Mark Warner's semi-annual Pig Roast is happening **tomorrow at 5:30 PM ET** , and we'd love for you to join us! We're taking this Virginia tradition online this year, for a video call where Mark and some of his friends will talk about all the ways Virginians can cast their ballots this year.

We're excited to for the first virtual pig roast, and all of the guests who will be joining us, including:
* Dr. Jill Biden;
* Virginia Senator Tim Kaine;
* New Jersey Senator Cory Booker;
* Representative Elaine Luria (VA-02);
* Representative Abigail Spanberger (VA-07); and
* Representative Bobby Scott (VA-03).

We'd love for you to join the party! If you plan to attend this free, virtual event, **[please RSVP using this link.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad6/53d9897e/55ee222d/1c880f93/384872926/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfJltpXguuWrFidYFZOjWlRj37JkuXkTM5953wasShfuLMCog/viewform")**

We hope to see you on Thursday!

-- Team Warner | [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dad6/53d9897e/55ee222d/1c880f92/384872926/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200916_e_1_fl__787__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

| Trail Update
---
| Friends, It was a busy week on the trail this week. I had the opportunity to stop by the Women for Trump event in Clay County, and I was grateful they allowed me to be theirkeynote speaker.
I started off Friday at Mojos-Food, Music and Soul 2020 Feeding the Fearless 4th Annual Event. It was a special experienceto be with our community and local leaders where we came together to pray and deliver food to our first responders on 9/11.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GGLiQV567EYJr1swss_jaDHkDba1kEJJyNnTn2vSzk10Q9Pcuyhova_cSManNL8EH6K0IQTT7YTGxVop9HDnenBC3Fp9YszYIaAEtGhVz0YLHMd4H9mTRevYiu73kKsTYa7eqNLTizH1J5H2vppBT0Tfdrs151JInTftAirtjtGfNGpdldSkC5hk-SxzvF2crIeGpRGy4p0qFvDevssGCbAv7OGbXDLRpLTtVe9Rzqs=&c=bm06Hqx2XqLR9z9-4-2jOfyZt1UkgRC_nZE0oDvXNbK3BJpV9SGxfw==&ch=U5ooGTjBsEPYGFmS7cY-BphKfO7T_WX0JTsY0327Yf5scUkpXYDcYA==)

---
| Following that event, I went to the Rustic Oaks Ranch! It was wonderful to see younger conservatives eager to elect President Donald J. Trump and join my campaign. The younger generation is integral to us remaining a strong party.
The team and I then joined Chuck Clemons for his Super Saturday. We were happy to help get Chuck work towards victory.

---
| I also visited the St. John's Classical Academy to learn about their school. I was privileged to hear from students and teachers directly. We discussed the importance of school choice, curriculum, civics, education funding, teacher pay, and so much more.
We have less than 50 days to go - I hope to see you out on the trail.
God Bless,
Kat

| Building Team kat
---
| I am proud to have President Trump's endorsement. I released a statement saying:

"Thank you, Mr. President! It is my honor to have your support in this crucial election. I look forward to joining your fight for an America First agenda on Capitol Hill. Together, we will rebuild the economy, bring jobs back to America, support law enforcement and first responders, and fight for our veterans here in Florida's 3rd Congressional District. I am proud to stand with President Trump and his grit as he leads our country."

| I am also proud to have the endorsement from the National Riffle Association. I released a statement saying:
"I strongly believe our right to carry shall not be infringed. As a concealed carry permit holder and wife to a first responder I am adamant about protecting the Second Amendment, as one of the most basic American rights."
---
| | |

| I am honored to have the endorsement of Representative Bobby Payne. In a statement he said:
"I am pleased to announce my support for Kat Cammack for Congress here in Florida's 3rd. Kat has the track record and life experiences necessary to lead our district and fight for the conservative values we believe in. She will work hard to keep taxes low, grow jobs, and advocate on our behalf in Washington."

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, It was a busy week on the trail this week. I had the opportunity to stop by the Women for Trump event in Clay County, and I was grateful they allowed me to be theirkeynote speaker. I started off Friday at Mojos-Food, Music and Soul 2020 Feeding the Fearless 4th Annual Event. It was a special experienceto be with our community and local leaders where we came together to pray and deliver food to our first responders on 9/11. | == | == | Following that event, I went to the Rustic Oaks Ranch! It was wonderful to see younger conservatives eager to elect President Donald J. Trump and join my campaign. The younger generation is integral to us remaining a strong party. The team and I then joined Chuck Clemons for his Super Saturday. We were happy to help get Chuck work towards victory. | I also visited the St. John's Classical Academy to learn about their school. I was privileged to hear from students and teachers directly. We discussed the importance of school choice, curriculum, civics, education funding, teacher pay, and so much more. We have less than 50 days to go - I hope to see you out on the trail. God Bless, Kat | Building Team kat | I am proud to have President Trump's endorsement. I released a statement saying: "Thank you, Mr. President! It is my honor to have your support in this crucial election. I look forward to joining your fight for an America First agenda on Capitol Hill. Together, we will rebuild the economy, bring jobs back to America, support law enforcement and first responders, and fight for our veterans here in Florida's 3rd Congressional District. I am proud to stand with President Trump and his grit as he leads our country." | == | | | | == | I am also proud to have the endorsement from the National Riffle Association. I released a statement saying: "I strongly believe our right to carry shall not be infringed. As a concealed carry permit holder and wife to a first responder I am adamant about protecting the Second Amendment, as one of the most basic American rights." | | | | I am honored to have the endorsement of Representative Bobby Payne. In a statement he said: "I am pleased to announce my support for Kat Cammack for Congress here in Florida's 3rd. Kat has the track record and life experiences necessary to lead our district and fight for the conservative values we believe in. She will work hard to keep taxes low, grow jobs, and advocate on our behalf in Washington." | | == | On Fox News | == | | This Saturday I was interviewed on Fox news. I joined them to defend President Trump and discuss his rising poll numbers in the Sunshine State. == | Day of Action | == | Join Team Kat for a Phonebanking Day of Action in Gainesville this Saturday! Meet us at our Campaign Headquarters at 4401 NW 25th Place, Suite M, Gainesville, FL, starting at 12PM. Light refreshments will be provided to our volunteers. RSVP on the form below: == Our campaign office is located behind Zaxby's, off 43rd Street. We are at the end of the plaza with 43rd Street Deli. If you have any questions about our Phonebanking Day of Action, please contact Condrad at 305.439.4007 or condrad@katforcongress.com. | How You Can Help | Join Team Kat As we head to the General Election in November, we need help spreading our winning message. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | == | | | | == | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | | | | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory in November! If you are able, please consider clicking == to make a contribution to the campaign. As always, thank you for your incredible trust and support! | == | Send us an mailto:info@katforcongress.com Like us on == Follow us on == Follow us on == Visit our == Sincerely, | | Kat Cammack Candidate for Congress | | | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
subject: We NEED urgent and bold climate action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Our power is greater with you.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2981%2E53494%2E0BxLcj) Friend, Wildfires tearing through the West. Sweltering heat one day and half a foot of snow two days later. Record rainfall in some parts of the world and record droughts in others. Not to mention, a pandemic that's been made more challenging to endure by climate change and this extreme weather. The events of 2020 have made it impossible to deny the urgency of the climate crisis -- and we don't have to stand by while it gets worse. You're a part of Evergreen because you believe in our vision for a just, inclusive clean energy economy. You recognize that addressing the climate crisis with the speed necessary will require full mobilization of the federal government. **And you know that our next president and Congress need to take urgent and bold climate action on day one in January 2021. That's why we put together a climate blueprint for leaders to adopt immediately upon taking office -- and that's why we need your support to keep up our pressure campaigns, especially as we see the crisis worsen around the country.** **[Donate today to support Evergreen's work in building and sharing a bold climate blueprint for leaders in Congress and the White House.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/919?t=3&akid=2981%2E53494%2E0BxLcj)** After this election, we're going to go all-in, urging America's newly elected leaders to adopt our gold-standard policy plan and act on their campaign promises. Together, we'll ensure that 2020 is remembered as the peak of this crisis, not the plateau -- or worse, an escalation to greater catastrophe. Thank you, Maggie Thomas

name: Bill Olson
subject: This animal shot two cops
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I spent 27 years in the U.S, Army, and I will not stand by while armed liberal execution mobs target police! I will not let the media's concocted lies about police supposedly being racist excuse the execution-style leftist targeting of cops!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

The far-Left media has whipped the Leftist rioters into such a frenzy that they think they are justified in carrying out execution-style murders of innocent cops.

Two Los Angeles County sheriff's deputies are fighting for their lives after they were shot multiple times at point-blank range in an ambush, authorities said.

Crowds of protesters blocked the entrance to St. Francis Medical Center in Lynwood, where the wounded officers were in a critical condition, police said. Some protesters chanted "we hope they die," the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Office said on Twitter. A witness told ABC7 that some had tried to break into the hospital's emergency room.

The shooting happened at around 7 p.m. Saturday at the Metro Blue Line station at Willowbrook Avenue and Compton Boulevard, not far from the Compton sheriff's station.

The Los Angeles County Sheriff's department shared video of the incident in a post on Twitter that shows a person open fire through the passenger-side window of the patrol car in Compton.

That's not all. It wasn't just that a bunch of murderous social justice warriors tried to kill innocent police officers.

A violent mob of woke liberals also blocked the emergency entrances to a hospital to ensure the deputies that were shot would die.

In a tweet late on Saturday night, the sheriff's department said protesters were blocking the entrance and exit to the hospital the wounded deputies were at.

"To the protesters blocking the entrance & exit of the HOSPITAL EMERGENCY ROOM yelling "We hope they die" referring to 2 LA Sheriff's ambushed today in #Compton: DO NOT BLOCK EMERGENCY ENTRIES & EXITS TO THE HOSPITAL," the tweet said. "People's lives are at stake when ambulances can't get through."

The sheriff's department later said deputies had issued a dispersal order for an unlawful assembly.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

Is this the America we know and want? A violent mob of Leftists trying to make sure people they shot actually die?

This is California. It's place that has long lost its way, full of hateful and spiteful far-Left ideologues.

Murderers.

I think President Trump should declare the state a disaster and take over its governance. It is clear these people have no self control or ability to protect their own people.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

It is abundantly clear- the far-Left actively hates us and wants to harm us. And that is who controls the Democrat party.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President- and that includes military and veterans like me!

If we don't want the murderous gangs of the far Left to have power, we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". The last time she did this, Steve Scalise got shot by one of her followers! We have to fight if we don't want to be treated like this!

I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a veteran and a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the media!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=glimkBokqF6OuRU&b=QVOMwNlZDcrfsaQ8pE_KhQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: They like to cheat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am in a tight race in a CLOSE swing district- and that's why I'm writing urgently to ask for your help. **

You've heard President Trump warn of the dangers of massive mail-in balloting. And he's absolutely right.
Think of it this way: _would YOU put $500 cash in an envelope and mail it to yourself? If not, why would you trust the Postal Service to deliver your ballot, your voice?_
President Trump's words on this topic are prescient:
_"So now the Democrats are using Mail Drop Boxes, which are a voter security disaster. Among other things, they make it possible for a person to vote multiple times. Also, who controls them, are they placed in Republican or Democrat areas? They are not Covid sanitized. A big fraud!"_
So we don't trust the Democrat mail in vote schemes. But many people have requested ballots- and we must fight for their votes!
_**In my district alone, 758,057 voters have requested mail in ballots (supposedly). That's a lot of voters who will be receiving their ballots next week- so they need to hear from me, RIGHT NOW!**_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=.2m2L7fjMoqa0BQPaY3W.g)
---

**_In Georgia, over 1,000 voters voted BOTH by mail AND in person!_**

_As many as 1,000 Georgians may have cast ballots in the June primary both by mail and in person, Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger said Tuesday, raising questions about how well poll workers in the state are enforcing safeguards._

_Raffensperger’s office is investigating whether those who voted twice did so intentionally and whether two votes were actually counted in each case. Georgia’s June 9 primary was plagued by widespread problems with the delivery of mail ballots and long lines at the polls._

_Raffensperger’s office acknowledged that many voters may have shown up in person because they were afraid that their mail ballots would not be counted._

_WE NEED URGENTLY TO ADVERTISE TO THESE VOTERS NEXT WEEK, AND TO MAKE SURE THAT PEOPLE DO NOT VOTE TWICE!_

[Can you help?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg)

I need you to help me beat this vicious leftist machine here in North Carolina. I stand with our President. Our people need to know who to vote for and how to do it- and for that I need your help!

**Pelosi's Democrats are trying to steal this thing. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and they won't give up easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can pull this off, but only with your help!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I want an accurate vote- no double voting allowed! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the right people win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5ZEdkf_j3Nxmng&b=jKzzAAMZk9MmfBOQScO4Jg)

Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: Ellen Foster, Campaign Manager
subject: Friend, we might have to make cuts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We missed our goal, friend |
---
Friend, I'm afraid I have some bad news to share: We didn't hit our mid-month grassroots fundraising goal.

We saw an outpouring of support over the last four days, but unfortunately we came in _$10,000 short_.

With absentee voting set to begin and Election Day less than seven weeks away, this is not a good time to fall short on our goals. **__I may have to make some significant budget cuts.__**

**Friend, small-dollar donations from people like you fund vital digital organizing efforts, advertising spends, and voter protection programs needed to win** \-- _and to fight back against the $35 MILLION that Mitch McConnell and his friends are spending to defeat Jon._

**I am meeting with Jon first thing tomorrow morning to go over our budget, and I will have to propose cuts to key programs --_unless we can raise those $10,000 before then._**

**[Friend, can you rush a donation of $25 or any amount BY TONIGHT so we can avoid making budget cuts and keep Jon on track to win?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e282f/5b2c1286/39d3d1df/25f31a02/2334901941/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_16_ellen_goal?refcode=em_2020_09_16_ellen_goal")**

clean_body: We missed our goal, friend | Friend, I'm afraid I have some bad news to share: We didn't hit our mid-month grassroots fundraising goal. We saw an outpouring of support over the last four days, but unfortunately we came in $10,000 short. With absentee voting set to begin and Election Day less than seven weeks away, this is not a good time to fall short on our goals. I may have to make some significant budget cuts. Friend, small-dollar donations from people like you fund vital digital organizing efforts, advertising spends, and voter protection programs needed to win \-- and to fight back against the $35 MILLION that Mitch McConnell and his friends are spending to defeat Jon. I am meeting with Jon first thing tomorrow morning to go over our budget, and I will have to propose cuts to key programs --unless we can raise those $10,000 before then. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for your help, Ellen Foster Campaign Manager Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Job opportunities and unemployment benefits
body:
2 expanded programs
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As our kids go back to school, we're also remaining laser-focused on getting Rhode Island back to work. We know that far too many Rhode Islanders are still out of work and struggling.
---
| | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmV0irFXPLpmL4TsY5otltfjgAS_XmWpQhe_dBm2Qho59fAJZbs8-_SRZXY20CkmmeT9IPtmxJCYgsi1QvZWJwSSJgy3MGXCLgIClJcA4lCNwrHGmI6W5MA_8jl3dATQ9smfIq1QIOS5l3h0krNK5Ue8M=&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==)
---|---
|
Last week, supplemental unemployment assistance of up to $900 went out to thousands of Rhode Islanders who were certified for unemployment benefits in the first few weeks of August. And we've successfully lobbied the federal government for an additional three weeks of support. The Department of Labor and Training will be distributing an additional $300 per week to those who certified for unemployment benefits for the weeks ending August 22, August 29, and September 5.

But we know this temporary relief isn't enough. And that's why we've taken bold action and launched Back to Work RI, [an ambitious, first-in-the-nation initiative](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmV_8PjBLwnDt0ntkB_hICmsi_OdklTffRjaWvuffHB2i1S6ymKlyQEepmQzuUIUZ0tcBEa5fFYht1wTvu5FNFBg4U_9JU8v_sM8qHPANhw2s6mclZ1Y4qdBlx4xGXmxIX0k3zqWF-O4XOKxsC0N81dDTF2QVfAadXN80viHPSmLCdSIrR173bHIhjh9GVHZPb7g==&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==) to supercharge our economic recovery and get Rhode Islanders job training with a guaranteed job at the end.
| And as we think about ways to compete in this new economy and emerge from the crisis more resilient than before, public-private partnerships are a critical ingredient. We already have commitments from CVS, Electric Boat, Microsoft and others to create more than 3,000 good jobs here in Rhode Island--many targeted for people without a college degree.
But getting the right mix of employers involved is only one piece of the puzzle. For Back to Work to be successful, we also need to be able to match jobseekers with the right training opportunities.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmVwaFBgajMDgxB3HlOPKhzl724lnNehAwydKsqBJOlbQlpfAwNnuT9tV_C387_WHbKcSG-gUuUk5DP9UkXaHj5-6rfdoTiJ39Sbqno4H8BnftJqsOe05S6xNUz11Yp0W_IlFGzqngAeTh9-jo0znwI1Y=&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmVwaFBgajMDgxB3HlOPKhzl724lnNehAwydKsqBJOlbQlpfAwNnuT9tV_C387_WHbKcSG-gUuUk5DP9UkXaHj5-6rfdoTiJ39Sbqno4H8BnftJqsOe05S6xNUz11Yp0W_IlFGzqngAeTh9-jo0znwI1Y=&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==).
---
| Earlier today, I announced a new partnership with Jobcase, the third-largest online jobseeker platform in the country, to help connect Rhode Islanders with Back to Work job training programs.
More than 60,000 Rhode Islanders are registered and active on the site, and they've created a special Back to Work forum to share information and updates with members. So, if you're interested getting updates about Back to Work, you can create a free Jobcase account and join the "[Back to Work Rhode Island Group](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmV_8PjBLwnDt0yFBRmHJuHvLnNFMCyuP-Ey9Xne1Z-ZOo8Nld1uJD0DlbXXQLu88JX8N5tJGpE9eSo4rLMkD9Vq4X3i3tXAxTxRD1iPsr-B2gqzjc2vAVK0XDrPN-6E805M01XiYYN8R5b5e-tGCiRec=&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==)" today.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KdK6hR8lyzdN1zEZD4q4e_MzDtmWa07eoaJkx-PNcAP1ttu0UcZmV_8PjBLwnDt0NmTp2DmE3pkmHlEJOWHMXX-OS_BMjll66jIeyKjbGA_w2SzNU9d3QWap6hG5cVGpHA9TQpCqrYCpCJ9ZmQa-9j0xHU3KMzQ_j-OPIFrTEf7NlLZi39w-M_l8LBOdMMzIu0fFmiyAgDyELji_CY5cboOKxJstbl02RFDhcocGWVln09JFp_3_Z-EBCzxEp9DTNuOTtwfVdfG5-wzkg859iogMtoQABndaWTFlMHGjmYkvrKDIqix6QmTOGCX56hp3uoWe5jJdGHw=&c=eRmE7aVgWard6_xSdm-YaCYKaOwFVhpcjHJYSIyI-zzcGAX3S_NHWw==&ch=kYJp4vrpXPixvAVh3iErZgAkWCCrRyDKJVMNnTpxNr2lvH4N_2w9_g==).

Peter,
Are you signed up yet for Mark Ronchetti’s Sleeves-Rolled-Up Saturday?

Next Saturday, September 19th, our team will hold its first Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday of the campaign. [_It’s time to roll up our sleeves and get to work!_](https://u14066317.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=xDqpR0G3DjuYE5JnpHlAmZTdBrgFC3xZepXQi3pi5WBIP0lBK7vph8muRdeP06RjWFwFyfAt4C7sHtrISUYW478TmarcMasy3a7k2Rcl0gPIz7so-2F-2Fwv8tzg7m5UD1F39hOz_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6KSJBUuyYeLhzob1wO7r1XEdQh3lbIXVqTmchCuxFB7aT8SbWAa4Xdaatn4WtsznsBDQLTgS6LHcSj3M2oAIvDq19QJk-2B0ZLts6PEPVL0O-2BHSbmi-2Fgg2HIMdrjWSWJT3UFR0duk-2FnchvX3kniCZDxePmoF9IA-2BdbR6T7dhrVMi-2FQqKhNJ8W1-2B173f6u8BZVu2uV2XcTfA1Ng7KfsXcfw0ET6-2BUvUgQvdkfKXRJiVFyQ522qBMwkjfxHPNf2ZiFNyms-2FxmDW9p7b7IO4cE8XSyuv1sVT1LuG829sBLKGp6Re3IhHtBkCcuRsH-2FU5FBDjGC5pMea-2FdP-2FQ2gBMyapGdDCQXbLVfJzXSliOlSdQZ1spc21SrSijcKMjjNuJPXTLTv4o65WW9vR0oYIRbIcHFR9qK5JH1jnx5xA3Or-2Bu2P-2BC1quF9wtIIr9XAzRw1iB7pEULh4PXoR2LZiiMh-2ByxMjRNNUIH1qQjroopAsLvXU8B95TSkqR8lN5qRoAlFQkcbLb4lioGpzpAOaLpyohS6l4HsTJ4kbEw-2FgykNcO7NUhoo3XIuiBEYKaEhJFVrr3162byf1CCr4h2oYy00jPaG2T1t5KcwRN8QC6Pgu9hKV2-2FNtJXDhMbYkmOrQvD4bWxJRzh4Wme36fmy-2Bl-2BiqcBQGqtgY60r0jllec6ZfeF2aAMQuavHxgEhAB1rwR-2BsDEGhXdytrNjkhTD1vQqSgrcfcxeIzk7nf-2Baumm17VpyqyHSUD-2FT-2FlWIF8tWY-2F5LrMQwQPRgAasXHC0rfEK3AJA-2F-2Fsy0YqPUGNqfsdxh0SGc4Es-2FZgAnumfr3hnIlnokvsX2658gRELzhxjiJMI6DFRl9wE-2BZKeQd00-2F4dyVpkdZA26fw-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Are you signed up yet for Mark Ronchetti’s Sleeves-Rolled-Up Saturday? Next Saturday, September 19th, our team will hold its first Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday of the campaign. Already, over 100 people have signed up to participate. Across the state, supporters will be safely and responsibly knocking on doors and making calls to support Mark’s campaign. Our team set an ambitious goal to talk to 25,000 voters in one day. Time is running out and to reach the goal, we need your help! -- The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support Mark is by hearing from other supporters like YOU! Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact me at mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=! With less than two months away from the general election, the Democrats are fiercely targeting this race. Ben Ray Lujan and his liberal allies in New York and California have already spent over a million dollars attacking Mark and his family with flat-out lies. IT’S UP TO US TO SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT WITH VOTERS and to remind New Mexicans Ben Ray Lujan left New Mexico 12 years ago and sold us out for D.C.’s far-left values. Climbing the political ladder was his priority and he certainly didn’t become Pelosi’s official assistant by standing up for us! We cannot let Lujan do the same with OUR Senate seat! We need supporters from across the state to fight with us and talk to voters about why this race is so important. We need your help to tell New Mexico about Mark! We hope we can count on you! Matthew Henderson Political Director PS: Every day counts and every door we knock on or call we make gets us one voter closer to victory! Time is running out and we need your help! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

body:

| | | Friend - I wanted you to be the first to know. On Tuesday, October 6, I will be joined by my friends **Hillary Clinton** and **Audra McDonald** for a special evening in support of Fair Fight PAC and Onward Together. [RSVP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a2/34a064cc/1bd453d5/702d87d/2863325938/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hillaryandstacey?refcode=e10062020a") Our conversation will focus on the state of our democracy, why your vote matters more than ever, and the work we all must do to ensure victory this November. With tickets starting at $50, I hope you will be able to join us. Your support will benefit **Fair Fight PAC** and **Onward Together** , two organizations dedicated to uplifting progressive principles and protecting voters' rights across the country. My friend Hillary has spent her life fighting for everyday Americans to have the opportunity to get ahead and stay ahead. And she's not stopping now, which is why I am grateful for her support and why I am looking forward to this in-depth discussion about how we can fight back and move onward -- together. Guaranteeing all citizens have access to free and fair elections is more important now than ever before -- and we can't do it alone. We need your support to help ensure every eligible voter is able to make their voice heard and have their vote counted. So mark your calendars, and join us in a few weeks for this discussion about how to stay vigilant and keep fighting for our democracy. I'll see you soon, Friend. -Stacey [RSVP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4a2/34a064cc/1bd453d5/702d87d/2863325938/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hillaryandstacey?refcode=e10062020a")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: Incomes hit record high and poverty reached record low in 2019
body:
American households saw their best economic gains in half a century last year under President Trump, according to a report this week... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef5b1b5fc7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 16, 2020
---
| | |
## **NEW: Incomes hit record high and poverty reached record low in 2019**
---
| **American households** saw their best economic gains in half a century last year under President Trump, according to a report this week from the Census Bureau.

**And with the President’s** pro-growth, pro-worker policies in action, this standard can be achieved again as America safely reopens from the Coronavirus pandemic.

**Median household income grew** by a stunning $4,400 in 2019, resulting in an all-time record of $68,700. This 6.8 percent one-year increase is the largest gain on record for median income growth.

**The poverty rate plunged** to an all-time low of 10.5 percent, as well. Between 2018 and 2019 alone, over 4 million Americans were lifted out of poverty, and the child poverty rate fell to a nearly 50-year low in 2019.

**Minority groups** including African Americans, Hispanic Americans, and Asian Americans saw the largest gains in income, while poverty rates fell to a record low for _every race and ethnic group_ in 2019.

**Black Americans** , for example, saw a 7.9 percent median income increase and a poverty rate that fell below 20 percent for the first time in history.

**The COVID-19 pandemic** disrupted this historic progress in 2020. Nevertheless, America today is witnessing the fastest recovery from any economic crisis in history. Thanks to the strong fundamentals of the Trump Economy, the monthly jobs report has met or exceeded economist expectations for four months in a row.

**The new Census report** confirms what we know to be true: With the right agenda for blue-collar and middle-class workers, there’s no limit to America’s economic greatness!

[📖 **Incomes Hit****Re****cord High and Poverty Reached****Record Low in 2019**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b8a35f6896&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the Day: Historic Abraham Accords signed at the White House!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e38033c4a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Yesterday, President Trump** welcomed leaders from Israel, the United Arab Emirates, and the Kingdom of Bahrain for the signing of the [**Abraham Accords**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f28bfdcfc3&e=3ee4985eea)**.**

**“These visionary leaders** will sign the first two peace deals between Israel and the Arab state in more than a quarter century. In Israel’s entire history, there have previously been only two such agreements,” President Trump said.

**“Now we have achieved** two in a single month—and there are more to follow.”
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump salutes as he boards Marine One on the South Lawn of the White House** | September 15, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8331a1e8a1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4010c385b2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=35582cbf47)

Here’s an idea: instead of defunding the police, we should be giving them MORE of our support to keep our communities and families safe! [Back the Blue. I can’t thank them enough for their support. But we’re still short $2,615 and the deadline is only a few hours away. It’s not looking good, Derek. If you’re able, please use this secure link to make a contribution before midnight. If you contribute before the deadline your contribution will be matched, ensuring your support goes twice as far: I know we can still hit this goal -- but only if you chip in right now. National Republicans are hoping we fail and miss goals like these. Let’s show them that Democrats have what it takes to win big in November by blowing this goal out of the water. Thanks for all you do, Terry Sent from my iPhone | Paid for by Virginians for Common Good | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e841/77d4c309/21b54671/2635ff31/3887485113/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e841/77d4c309/21b54671/2635ff30/3887485113/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e841/77d4c309/21b54671/2635ff33/3887485113/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

body:
Fall is in the air, and it’s a perfect time to explore Indiana’s great outdoors. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLLwSUJ0e5iLbPzSxbA_hJBXwtc6XvrY5XcoPxewPAoYq-6_T_p9MRFs79N21ynIPXLGPMDW1sUKx_fKPG_3YzNuVqntoz0GXLfwVoWxQyIS3jqR9bDTrj5Gf_pweubg5qLzZ7OesJmG8I5z3hNVnjAyiWJ-KzB0iarM1P4JRkZRu4B_NoVFh3UI0Jhh-Y9AyxPQv3nE1NAnEjGGPj06Y2_gHFoghEgD3rC7F3bX1dReUFYfgzwHeQVa3DZEtJAlYqwgo8f9Q1C7zqpyiw45vXLru7O8SehoM9LjvODiBXDjxa165-c8fjR-Mp4yvFfrUQQnnPIgkTJCvd--QhxI77aekEkUQN8XW_JQeCvqQ1M8xPdYrs9F0luHE_cEv9atXpu4VkJ5nk2ExErAhm1y1KuC9s83U1CcBkfTjQPIl38y0RKiGQ62RdNSWFaKPSmToFTMVpWPoQvbL8GMAaLQPLfY%3D) Friend \- can you feel it?
_Fall is in the air, and it’s a perfect time to explore Indiana’s great outdoors. _
Eric, Janet and Henry love taking advantage of Indiana’s natural beauty and have spent a lot of time taking in the majestic views that our state has to offer. We hope that you get lots of time to explore the great outdoors this fall, and we put together a list of Indiana’s best views to help guide your fall activities!
Check out our list below — we hope it inspires you to go on some road trips and adventures this fall! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLLwSUJ0e5iLbPzSxbA_hJBXwtc6XvrY5XcoPxewPAoYq-6_T_p9MRFs79N21ynIPXLGPMDW1sUKx_fKPG_3YzNuVqntoz0GXLfwVoWxQyIS3jqR9bDTrj5Gf_pweubg5qLzZ7OesJmG8I5z3hNVnjAyiWJ-KzB0iarM1P4JRkZRu4B_NoVFh3UI0Jhh-Y9AyxPQv3nE1NAnEjGGPj06Y2_gHFoghEgD3rC7F3bX1dReUFYfgzwHeQVa3DZEtJAlYq522EBBYJHdGtI41lEmwSmFVq-KTF7aglMbXqPXP3QuXm7fScGtpS10hoho-e5apKHTFYr0WTRhfJNDTCnhvLy6FpQq1d-hFM1x9LXoe8ku8yd8aCh214tDgaCnRfWevw8QYicgifxqRgNCcN6MhPBxU3sMcYm9b2Yfpo7KlAJ4r_sx7dFieITJ2WNJfPVThJnKV1dVDAX8lSIx3v9mi7Wk%3D)
* [**Overlook Restaurant, Leavenworth**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLNQ0Rr5uMffgTLAK_Yw_0qnzJ-Ei7fABASWuALb24vB6DufoQ1Wm2O1185Lx_Fc255OQbu5I9-hB9-2HOTaUxbzUMcrb-RqcgmtQ508_0gLZAhm7UW3Inuv_N-6jw6ZI7XRu8JYR0Tge4hRmJppGb_ChztAB3FB_fCetO3hTAp15WQrWRLROSM8vGYzBOqvzWQ4_zOL6QfpZ49dv_oY-GS5_NgrxnNRg4w84nQaungKzJmuAdiDOrzwsvUP3Si90WtXAosBN5Qetlrl0BaWbpklADusLYnnbpmPkhEHLJ1MfI1sPc0O4oJpM7u9joApKH2NPHf2VpmW1o9KdVNmLuywZd1UJYYoJfH41Ur8zJkxN2MT2S9J2ygou94leuD0pD7M5JFX0s_Bq4ytoV3Q9sOAV1Gcz0fzWFS2z7f9iwomooturtAr5ptcnpMfVhGXxdg%3D%3D) \- Want to enjoy a burger and a beer while looking at a gorgeous view of the Ohio River? **[Say no more — the Overlook Restaurant](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLNQ0Rr5uMffgTLAK_Yw_0qnzJ-Ei7fABASWuALb24vB6DufoQ1Wm2O1185Lx_Fc255OQbu5I9-hB9-2HOTaUxbzUMcrb-RqcgmtQ508_0gLZAhm7UW3Inuv_N-6jw6ZI7XRu8JYR0Tge4hRmJppGb_ChztAB3FB_fCetO3hTAp15WQrWRLROSM8vGYzBOqvzWQ4_zOL6QfpZ49dv_oY-GS5_NgrxnNRg4w84nQaungKzY9xk5IYp3Qw81h9ihzoDSy2TiNyS1OFmdDUS6vORdZBZZkb9tHrFx-FGDmXnPfLrfsAhyo4Ww4DfxqAZmT_GXeN5M9CBxIgJ_NPWRxlnJ6Rrx0mVGzN3t3UUYKtkU_xF3SmSRkVVxwGCs6Vd001vDdHNZpu1_YbA-rfpUpHPOkuCIFQFW9eoc0Lt8fDWJUVWps2lyrtMuHHjTaqr2gkaPA%3D%3D) **is for you. Be sure to stop by if you’re passing through Leavenworth!
* **[The Point, Hanover College](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLAwiNJMJOjHhGj3Z_GDi98ygH-DRkmF6_NoYIdQlFUT-Dn4Z9WCvSWXxf12TdQjUBSpFi-MdbOMuh-X2agoQv7srMkNBZn4xAlaCc5nN_GE7Qcx_Ck0nkpTmzoj0SXOH7pQPlh0k-sjFbWj53sk1ss9hfmESmQoTpUE7GnfqEqG0pEtaBpwcC2nra2iS58ejuST5FgLPqN0i_iDLS88bvNNctaD055EsrNWw2UsjTd3WWVjZncfCPHXf62TJRkoD9n1XYJh3pgyJ4SoiQlvx1pEiumyWL6FIAbBzCRlklL6eY0sRuDtLhRLjRM1nPLmbB-PEqrimx5XetTWCRiSKlAw1oQo0XmoYcI7mzSjLI12euAsU5SDUzV0eQ6TRMsEyTELYqM-uqpnelrmGQ7gqfqOWsRs_KW3AqeYdQ1mLLsrUCNMyQvbqGoSrHUy0oNCgEgYD16mgPQkbtABhTfm4gwk%3D)** \- Hanover is one of the most beautiful schools in the entire country, and **[The Point](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLAwiNJMJOjHhGj3Z_GDi98ygH-DRkmF6_NoYIdQlFUT-Dn4Z9WCvSWXxf12TdQjUBSpFi-MdbOMuh-X2agoQv7srMkNBZn4xAlaCc5nN_GE7Qcx_Ck0nkpTmzoj0SXOH7pQPlh0k-sjFbWj53sk1ss9hfmESmQoTpUE7GnfqEqG0pEtaBpwcC2nra2iS58ejuST5FgLPqN0i_iDLS88bvNNctaD055EsrNWw2UsjTd3WWVjZncfCPHXf62TJRkoD9hKSZNSXhb2dwrEFkXhIjRIyum-Tp2biGh58-OPcqFKTtdGpnuXfRU0WJSDzvmtqywAsua1gtiH2bK0lqiHmj4YqA-LFqK3qWlB979-TraHtcDY0uOPm-11oj6ZiS1Ho3mgIb3EkmbUXfyCUlDnAnnLS-eonJcqXLqsbjc0T1pobltEwLhFtuE3QMnfKllRXkLIIYkL_INQ-5kC2v19svSU%3D)** is one of the biggest reasons why. Stop by, tour the historic college, and be sure to snap a picture with the Ohio River in the background!
* **[West Baden Springs](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLM5AE5-qmodcT8ylA_xTtYIY3lCCSWRJMn2H0qcRX5zizUrOu6J8zVKcjq5oKMYab9NjMH9yPjHpqGzZgfWq4y7MjzL1DJl1sWEBJjFOAIEdp7u-W2gyGjP3ZEo9z6PHMA7sKqlUP82zJcKTQq68rwdTdLNA57ajzyZDghp4YVWeFCjS24n8201zC2FZBpF70PvG3QK6xafCs-nhr5NpGc3qAqTBnitD8ojkwcUSwlHlcdMRf8ZJNE8Di2NqvjgPJnKkjCQlxGajrouRxrikcxJ6VSrsbi3dM_BB7Xxiv62mbVaBHkqlpv0puLsn3Lck3QrgBGDVj7v3-doHJ68V4AiYDGyil3nF0lEL_e9TDPCMVdhDGxCP1PrC3eQyLbZqk45nugyExkOdy2pAXyPSakTXPpRx2u6SjwYzJ2iG8u-vUV-O-sQQWQXEOFibginoHBPHZ05voNwJtgbfH-XgMsQ%3D)** \- Beautiful hot springs and the West Baden Springs Hotel aren’t the only reason to stop by — it’s also the birthplace of Hoosier legend Larry Bird! Book a getaway and take a step back in time.
* **[Touchdown Jesus](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLAmstD-r3mZvpoAEAnfPMQSVnz9dDx0YR4xbNm4j4IyJxVygRu6SACGvF28_DbzRhQJLMC6IRg4sROjhdeZzBQd4P8npORnUAkmpOb9astxp5ptXDhbZxndPgKq0PNMQOQd6V3bTXuInpNnVyRrvpz3h0zUiJILVxksu8gRsEMUR4OuBX25UG36KKfpIQtgIegIE9nZn-PM94kZ8gdbQr0hhXuYfvYoJtHDpmUngFcu_1kbVf_f2tvDBPfFVZ2WvEyqYuHW2kNQzutkUZwK4YownCYsEmrlTJY_JVYvKlUMdfhzkfmo33STzovQf8mV3kf3M_4V1CYhA9ViivUbtKGRRVntla8RNznhm3OgaMhjlSDFQPsDMdXtouAOS681UqHxOVd9e6T9LuI2M7aIyWngR8yVmuLTNjt5SFeYtmYUjzyZ4EHJnWGdMM3sb4eVHuehu9N4R1yEE0hTh1KhR1HU%3D)** \- Facing Notre Dame’s football stadium, the facade of the Theodore Hesburgh Library is certainly a sight to behold in South Bend. It’s become a familiar sight on fall Saturdays for anyone tuning into a Notre Dame game!
* **[Brown County State Park](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLGYC6II_yZaTqDq6xazlGnVfo4BQfgM59UgBY4UFe8laomS-j9eZzFDCjMUaOZnHWKYkML0o93e6xABR-FNfVu2w_ouBRAKJyPlCVWbbJGZVxCuivsfKwZ884P98aMLPcPwJe8SMiG2ELXzmKmFfTh4hLxta0JWphIMrfAiF3CzIDuOKkuhYZj9k0vXgJxNbuZYMaA1hUQw8zZ0dpHS6pS7lUF0CunZwlkVvkBwz2Wfzg7AtrmBer10KwSILxVs6laPX6FEf79Gts8B90lFEqm1-J-LQfYQ8Nx06nnrDtfC5jYRpWc3TgmhatqphTGwS1unM9RADqCKDnX7et-3lfErTSb8-5onoFMZEjWfO7HVuvdX5zwo7TUYGG8HvQ_7gJyhJjsa8tl5yUug9srYgQM8-HE6kwSUeoOffj6G5MmMaqVJ2tHDfKPR83W6nyesEMVs0W-GkBLNR7PmRgWMDooU%3D)** \- An Indiana natural treasure, it’s one of our most beautiful state parks. Be sure to climb the 90’ Fire Tower and get an amazing view of the hills o’ Brown!
* **[Turn 4 in the Grandstand at the Indy 500](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLOmhqegrD96asWLqxulwngWgFXhikkWkIq1hSWGWNlic6AcmJKs4vAbHyfbL2I9vPUhXkhXkv6HcD-Xzy2YbreyGFIbwWABnylJ3a8lKKUIB3AXfz31ZlM52OBU71eERYOYfEqYYOS4_CA3yjsce9fj2khhJcng1aJZ2y54TbZ-SLa4mEMVYD3DwtH-SMWecVv-jDbZc4uGo04zhMpiW4UdZuABph4qPB72sn_A26OGL3Lmw8KEcgoTLOjtyAe7k7-uJdsFSMsskKd8kgJS2RNh6biqOuGPKYGHARJJxTfYRaGxTGuFaByW_ExBwNYvJvotpiJzj8wVZ6XvoDHSwbeHWGZhod3su6X09MbC3xzJJygJopUQba-AAgX7W2wHX5M7PyZGtt6038EJVmjbu60--32qyfy9JExKhL50wos5sKchCHe-NtV4IML6K7poiuVkMyBTftfnHUEod2qjX4I4NMbfwcScWFNTH_eVmbSOT)** \- The smell of gasoline, the thrill of victory, the agony of defeat...you can’t beat Turn 4 at Indianapolis Motor Speedway. We weren’t able to pack the grandstand this year, but we’ll be back before we know it.
* **[Indiana Dunes National& State Parks](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLMnBrM5kd3rswZRpE-eLj39e83E2xz8vxVeQ9OYBh7aJG_hVB0C62rVfreKoUv7vxGJiappJOx6eGEn7tmbJV-sUhVOh2ZJI7gWh9FQiNloikuDeh2vWasj_uTswz7OhrYvF1IHepsjau7q-yRz1D6BOIP2L2HBVGS-zfZow2g0i02H_lkzYOqU3aE_4tn2CZgLyxlFN8pUGZ3Vfss3GxuOxfDTEmx-BuT13TPP_EOg62MUP2PBMV3cHQrW-1x6EmXxpnO-K4sIQiJGU9p25KEA-tXjwWodKk9ogW4dNpX5NCrsBqeu25hIdUZq846AZ7A1HdTKzGdkTsYLQLFxCmfQ4hc8QbMUUE0S39IffYNKGwV1b91zDOYeawlucANBPRvJrSuJbKapb3Mg_O63hZpd5Io5gW2i64R6V8riqgwhjDyywFtCMQjuylF6_QYg9dg%3D%3D)** \- You can’t beat the shoreline of Lake Michigan. Take a stroll through some of the 50 miles of trails and check out some of Indiana’s most beautiful and unique natural resources.

That’s our list for this week — do you have an amazing view you want to share with us? Let us know below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2af7a78956e24ac79b1683fa4f31be00&_e=2qNWNSpnUHf1BFayvbtRLLwSUJ0e5iLbPzSxbA_hJBXwtc6XvrY5XcoPxewPAoYq-6_T_p9MRFs79N21ynIPXLGPMDW1sUKx_fKPG_3YzNuVqntoz0GXLfwVoWxQyIS3jqR9bDTrj5Gf_pweubg5qLzZ7OesJmG8I5z3hNVnjAyiWJ-KzB0iarM1P4JRkZRu4B_NoVFh3UI0Jhh-Y9AyxPQv3nE1NAnEjGGPj06Y2_gHFoghEgD3rC7F3bX1dReUFYfgzwHeQVa3DZEtJAlYq4aeFThx7sKRelh3pfL8eOF2c78snJ2G42pcha2JsiqE4iebJ0dqkhokt_tfXW41xV3bSU_Yqa2T5PdkznOS_pgoFCoxZlnha__GyrzVhVMxqaR1fI2oeH2_OJe0FXL0Z_uR-kUa4995NvhnZPXrErQxUeuOzhNgVcNj7tPkANgsoboeNwisjI4xypF3MC_kp9SbJ6lwr6LlfUkM0f6pD1I%3D) Thanks for reading,

clean_body: Fall is in the air, and it’s a perfect time to explore Indiana’s great outdoors. Friend \- can you feel it? Fall is in the air, and it’s a perfect time to explore Indiana’s great outdoors. Eric, Janet and Henry love taking advantage of Indiana’s natural beauty and have spent a lot of time taking in the majestic views that our state has to offer. We hope that you get lots of time to explore the great outdoors this fall, and we put together a list of Indiana’s best views to help guide your fall activities! Check out our list below — we hope it inspires you to go on some road trips and adventures this fall! \- Want to enjoy a burger and a beer while looking at a gorgeous view of the Ohio River? is for you. Be sure to stop by if you’re passing through Leavenworth! \- Hanover is one of the most beautiful schools in the entire country, and is one of the biggest reasons why. Stop by, tour the historic college, and be sure to snap a picture with the Ohio River in the background! \- Beautiful hot springs and the West Baden Springs Hotel aren’t the only reason to stop by — it’s also the birthplace of Hoosier legend Larry Bird! Book a getaway and take a step back in time. \- Facing Notre Dame’s football stadium, the facade of the Theodore Hesburgh Library is certainly a sight to behold in South Bend. It’s become a familiar sight on fall Saturdays for anyone tuning into a Notre Dame game! \- An Indiana natural treasure, it’s one of our most beautiful state parks. Be sure to climb the 90’ Fire Tower and get an amazing view of the hills o’ Brown! \- The smell of gasoline, the thrill of victory, the agony of defeat...you can’t beat Turn 4 at Indianapolis Motor Speedway. We weren’t able to pack the grandstand this year, but we’ll be back before we know it. ** \- You can’t beat the shoreline of Lake Michigan. Take a stroll through some of the 50 miles of trails and check out some of Indiana’s most beautiful and unique natural resources. That’s our list for this week — do you have an amazing view you want to share with us? Let us know below! Thanks for reading, Holcomb Crew | | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020.
