name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: I Think It's Safe to Say We Have a Movement
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=agbUm5_IOY63azyaFKT0jQ

Peter

A massive wave of patriotism has swept throughout the East San Gabriel Valley, and the voters can hardly contain their excitement to flip District 32, reelect our President, and ensure we never deal with the kind of tyrannical leadership and anti-police rhetoric we are witnessing ever again.

This past weekend, District 32 was once again home to the largest freedom rally in Southern California. Despite fires in our backyards, and despite the rest of 2020 madness, several hundred freedom-loving patriots turned out to blow off steam in one of the most fun and loving environments you could be a part of.

Here are some photos of what we have been up to:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=QeyNjmPgNMgZQStIHsxu8A

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=QeyNjmPgNMgZQStIHsxu8A

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=QeyNjmPgNMgZQStIHsxu8A

On more of a business note, I just want to take a moment to acknowledge the incredible achievements that have taken place over the last month in regards to peace deals between Israel and UAE/Bahrain, as well as with Serbia and Kosovo. In May 2017, during President Trump's first visit to Israel as POTUS, I was living in Tel Aviv. It was incredible. The whole country stopped. Even the millennial metropolitan liberals were fascinated as they watched him pray at the Western Wall. The President and his team stated their ambitious goals for the region. Many mocked Trump and Kushner. Some protested about climate change at the US embassy. Many of us finally had hope that it was finally time to overcome the difficulty and betrayal of the previous 8 years. What a journey this has been. I hope to get elected and serve on the House Foreign Affairs Committee to continue to work towards peace.

November 3 is rapidly approaching, so get involved now to help bring this campaign and our movement across the finish line. Please respond to this email if you would like information on the next rally, or if you would like a Joshua Scott for Congress yard sign at your home.

See you soon.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=agbUm5_IOY63azyaFKT0jQ

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626)214-5406

Donate

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=gi0StNVlXIfBCP.&b=QeyNjmPgNMgZQStIHsxu8A

clean_body: Image Peter A massive wave of patriotism has swept throughout the East San Gabriel Valley, and the voters can hardly contain their excitement to flip District 32, reelect our President, and ensure we never deal with the kind of tyrannical leadership and anti-police rhetoric we are witnessing ever again. This past weekend, District 32 was once again home to the largest freedom rally in Southern California. Despite fires in our backyards, and despite the rest of 2020 madness, several hundred freedom-loving patriots turned out to blow off steam in one of the most fun and loving environments you could be a part of. Here are some photos of what we have been up to: Image Image Image On more of a business note, I just want to take a moment to acknowledge the incredible achievements that have taken place over the last month in regards to peace deals between Israel and UAE/Bahrain, as well as with Serbia and Kosovo. In May 2017, during President Trump's first visit to Israel as POTUS, I was living in Tel Aviv. It was incredible. The whole country stopped. Even the millennial metropolitan liberals were fascinated as they watched him pray at the Western Wall. The President and his team stated their ambitious goals for the region. Many mocked Trump and Kushner. Some protested about climate change at the US embassy. Many of us finally had hope that it was finally time to overcome the difficulty and betrayal of the previous 8 years. What a journey this has been. I hope to get elected and serve on the House Foreign Affairs Committee to continue to work towards peace. November 3 is rapidly approaching, so get involved now to help bring this campaign and our movement across the finish line. Please respond to this email if you would like information on the next rally, or if you would like a Joshua Scott for Congress yard sign at your home. See you soon. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The RGA is hoping you don't read this email.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8156%2E868730%2EbKSrCu) Friend, Our deadline is tonight -- and we're short of our $25,000 goal. Now this is a real goal, meant to beat back against the multimillion-dollar war chest that the Republican Governors Association has on hand to unseat me. They haven't released any fundraising numbers since early 2020, but the news then was grim: a $14.1 million haul, making it the most successful quarter in a presidential election year. That's on top of the $200 million they raised in 2018 and 2019. The RGA would love if you assumed this race was in the bag and deleted this email -- it's how Republicans won in 2016, after all. We can't take this for granted. The cavalry is not coming -- there is no one here but us to win this race and keep Washington state safe from my Trump-loving opponent who will put politics and profits over people's health and progress. If we want to win, we have 30 days to make our case -- and time is running out. **Washingtonians begin voting exactly one month from today, and we have to make every single day count.[We're short of our $25,000 goal by just $5,478. Will you donate $5 or more before tonight's midnight deadline to close the gap?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11351?t=4&akid=8156%2E868730%2EbKSrCu)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11352?t=5&akid=8156%2E868730%2EbKSrCu)

Very truly yours,
Jay

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Celebrating the groundbreaking of a new VA Clinic in Peru
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
I am honored to stand with veterans, and I will respect their service in my words and in my votes | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=47e2354d41&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

I had the great honor of attending a groundbreaking ceremony for a new Veterans Affairs clinic in Peru, Indiana, yesterday morning. While in Miami County, I also discussed issues facing our veteran community with veterans at the event, as well as doctors and nurses of the VA clinic and local elected officials.

Where was Jackie? We couldn't tell you -- because she sent a surrogate on her behalf.

Jackie Walorski has also been missing as veterans -- those who have made the ultimate sacrifice -- have been disparaged in our country by the Commander in Chief. In fact, she's [been complicit in dishonoring our military and country. ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ac209d1cf9&e=5886ca081d)

Please, will you consider a contribution to my campaign? Our veterans deserve better. The people of Indiana deserve better.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b0b4e2d533&e=5886ca081d)
---
| I was proud to meet with veterans and our Veterans Affairs medical team yesterday to understand the issues facing our community.

[**If I have the privilege to serve as Congresswoman for the Second District, I will honor veterans in my words and my actions.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d132b69a03&e=5886ca081d)

As the daughter of a WWII veteran with a brother-in-law and nephew who served active duty tours in Iraq and Korea, and a niece attending one of our military academies, I recognize the sacrifice that our service members and military families make every single day.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c342206beb&e=5886ca081d)
---
| If you're interested in learning more about where I stand on veterans issues, you can watch [a forum I hosted on May 28](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=caeb51b6a1&e=5886ca081d) with veterans Rodger J. Pinto, United States Army; Celeste Ross, United States Marine Corps; and Andrew Stryker, Indiana Army National Guard.

Be well,

Pat
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.
---
| Pat Hackett for CongressPO Box 8066South Bend, IN 46660-8066
